translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Blessed is the man who doesn’t walk in the counsel of the wicked, nor stand on the path of sinners, nor sit in the seat of scoffers;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: but his delight is in Yahweh’s  law. On his law he meditates day and night.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He will be like a tree planted by the streams of water, that produces its fruit in its season, whose leaf also does not wither. Whatever he does shall prosper.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The wicked are not so, but are like the chaff which the wind drives away.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore the wicked shall not stand in the judgment, nor sinners in the congregation of the righteous.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For Yahweh knows the way of the righteous, but the way of the wicked shall perish.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Why do the nations rage, and the peoples plot a vain thing?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The kings of the earth take a stand, and the rulers take counsel together, against Yahweh, and against his Anointed,  saying,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “Let’s break their bonds apart, and cast their cords from us.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He who sits in the heavens will laugh. The Lord  will have them in derision.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then he will speak to them in his anger, and terrify them in his wrath:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “Yet I have set my King on my holy hill of Zion.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will tell of the decree. Yahweh said to me, “You are my son. Today I have become your father.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Ask of me, and I will give the nations for your inheritance, the uttermost parts of the earth for your possession.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You shall break them with a rod of iron. You shall dash them in pieces like a potter’s vessel.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Now therefore be wise, you kings. Be instructed, you judges of the earth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Serve Yahweh with fear, and rejoice with trembling.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Give sincere homage to the Son,  lest he be angry, and you perish on the way, for his wrath will soon be kindled. Blessed are all those who take refuge in him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Psalm by David, when he fled from Absalom his son. Yahweh, how my adversaries have increased! Many are those who rise up against me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Many there are who say of my soul, “There is no help for him in God.” Selah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But you, Yahweh, are a shield around me, my glory, and the one who lifts up my head.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I cry to Yahweh with my voice, and he answers me out of his holy hill. Selah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I laid myself down and slept. I awakened; for Yahweh sustains me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will not be afraid of tens of thousands of people who have set themselves against me on every side.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Arise, Yahweh! Save me, my God! For you have struck all of my enemies on the cheek bone. You have broken the teeth of the wicked.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Salvation belongs to Yahweh. Your blessing be on your people. Selah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Chief Musician; on stringed instruments. A Psalm by David. Answer me when I call, God of my righteousness. Give me relief from my distress. Have mercy on me, and hear my prayer.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You sons of men, how long shall my glory be turned into dishonor? Will you love vanity, and seek after falsehood? Selah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But know that Yahweh has set apart for himself him who is godly: Yahweh will hear when I call to him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Stand in awe, and don’t sin. Search your own heart on your bed, and be still. Selah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Offer the sacrifices of righteousness. Put your trust in Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Many say, “Who will show us any good?” Yahweh, let the light of your face shine on us.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have put gladness in my heart, more than when their grain and their new wine are increased.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In peace I will both lay myself down and sleep, for you, Yahweh alone, make me live in safety.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Chief Musician, with the flutes. A Psalm by David. Give ear to my words, Yahweh. Consider my meditation.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Listen to the voice of my cry, my King and my God; for to you do I pray.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh, in the morning you shall hear my voice. In the morning I will lay my requests before you, and will watch expectantly.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For you are not a God who has pleasure in wickedness. Evil can’t live with you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The arrogant shall not stand in your sight. You hate all workers of iniquity.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You will destroy those who speak lies. Yahweh abhors the bloodthirsty and deceitful man.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But as for me, in the abundance of your loving kindness I will come into your house. I will bow toward your holy temple in reverence of you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Lead me, Yahweh, in your righteousness because of my enemies. Make your way straight before my face.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For there is no faithfulness in their mouth. Their heart is destruction. Their throat is an open tomb. They flatter with their tongue.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Hold them guilty, God. Let them fall by their own counsels; Thrust them out in the multitude of their transgressions, for they have rebelled against you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But let all those who take refuge in you rejoice, Let them always shout for joy, because you defend them. Let them also who love your name be joyful in you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For you will bless the righteous. Yahweh, you will surround him with favor as with a shield.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Chief Musician; on stringed instruments, upon the eight-stringed lyre. A Psalm by David. Yahweh, don’t rebuke me in your anger, neither discipline me in your wrath.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Have mercy on me, Yahweh, for I am faint. Yahweh, heal me, for my bones are troubled.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My soul is also in great anguish. But you, Yahweh — how long?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Return, Yahweh. Deliver my soul, and save me for your loving kindness’ sake.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For in death there is no memory of you. In Sheol,  who shall give you thanks?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I am weary with my groaning. Every night I flood my bed. I drench my couch with my tears.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My eye wastes away because of grief. It grows old because of all my adversaries.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Depart from me, all you workers of iniquity, for Yahweh has heard the voice of my weeping.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh has heard my supplication. Yahweh accepts my prayer.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: May all my enemies be ashamed and dismayed. They shall turn back, they shall be disgraced suddenly.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A meditation by David, which he sang to Yahweh, concerning the words of Cush, the Benjamite. Yahweh, my God, I take refuge in you. Save me from all those who pursue me, and deliver me,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: lest they tear apart my soul like a lion, ripping it in pieces, while there is no one to deliver.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh, my God, if I have done this, if there is iniquity in my hands,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: if I have rewarded evil to him who was at peace with me (yes, if I have delivered him who without cause was my adversary),

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: let the enemy pursue my soul, and overtake it; yes, let him tread my life down to the earth, and lay my glory in the dust. Selah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Arise, Yahweh, in your anger. Lift up yourself against the rage of my adversaries. Awake for me. You have commanded judgment.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let the congregation of the peoples surround you. Rule over them on high.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh administers judgment to the peoples. Judge me, Yahweh, according to my righteousness, and to my integrity that is in me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Oh let the wickedness of the wicked come to an end, but establish the righteous; their minds and hearts are searched by the righteous God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My shield is with God, who saves the upright in heart.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: God is a righteous judge, yes, a God who has indignation every day.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: If a man doesn’t relent, he will sharpen his sword; he has bent and strung his bow.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has also prepared for himself the instruments of death. He makes ready his flaming arrows.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Behold,  he travails with iniquity. Yes, he has conceived mischief, and brought out falsehood.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has dug a hole, and has fallen into the pit which he made.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The trouble he causes shall return to his own head. His violence shall come down on the crown of his own head.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will give thanks to Yahweh according to his righteousness, and will sing praise to the name of Yahweh Most High.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Chief Musician; on an instrument of Gath. A Psalm by David. Yahweh, our Lord, how majestic is your name in all the earth, who has set your glory above the heavens!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: From the lips of babes and infants you have established strength, because of your adversaries, that you might silence the enemy and the avenger.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When I consider your heavens, the work of your fingers, the moon and the stars, which you have ordained;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: what is man, that you think of him? What is the son of man, that you care for him?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For you have made him a little lower than God,  and crowned him with glory and honor.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You make him ruler over the works of your hands. You have put all things under his feet:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All sheep and cattle, yes, and the animals of the field,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The birds of the sky, the fish of the sea, and whatever passes through the paths of the seas.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh, our Lord, how majestic is your name in all the earth!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Chief Musician. Set to “The Death of the Son.” A Psalm by David. I will give thanks to Yahweh with my whole heart. I will tell of all your marvelous works.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will be glad and rejoice in you. I will sing praise to your name, O Most High.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When my enemies turn back, they stumble and perish in your presence.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For you have maintained my just cause. You sit on the throne judging righteously.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have rebuked the nations. You have destroyed the wicked. You have blotted out their name forever and ever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The enemy is overtaken by endless ruin. The very memory of the cities which you have overthrown has perished.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But Yahweh reigns forever. He has prepared his throne for judgment.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He will judge the world in righteousness. He will administer judgment to the peoples in uprightness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh will also be a high tower for the oppressed; a high tower in times of trouble.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Those who know your name will put their trust in you, for you, Yahweh, have not forsaken those who seek you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Sing praises to Yahweh, who dwells in Zion, and declare among the people what he has done.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For he who avenges blood remembers them. He doesn’t forget the cry of the afflicted.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Have mercy on me, Yahweh. See my affliction by those who hate me, and lift me up from the gates of death;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: that I may show all of your praise. In the gates of the daughter of Zion, I will rejoice in your salvation.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The nations have sunk down in the pit that they made. In the net which they hid, their own foot is taken.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh has made himself known. He has executed judgment. The wicked is snared by the work of his own hands. Meditation. Selah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The wicked shall be turned back to Sheol,  even all the nations that forget God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the needy shall not always be forgotten, nor the hope of the poor perish forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Arise, Yahweh! Don’t let man prevail. Let the nations be judged in your sight.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Put them in fear, Yahweh. Let the nations know that they are only men. Selah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Why do you stand far off, Yahweh? Why do you hide yourself in times of trouble?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In arrogance, the wicked hunt down the weak. They are caught in the schemes that they devise.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the wicked boasts of his heart’s cravings. He blesses the greedy, and condemns Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The wicked, in the pride of his face, has no room in his thoughts for God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: His ways are prosperous at all times. He is haughty, and your laws are far from his sight. As for all his adversaries, he sneers at them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He says in his heart, “I shall not be shaken. For generations I shall have no trouble.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: His mouth is full of cursing, deceit, and oppression. Under his tongue is mischief and iniquity.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He lies in wait near the villages. From ambushes, he murders the innocent. His eyes are secretly set against the helpless.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He lurks in secret as a lion in his ambush. He lies in wait to catch the helpless. He catches the helpless, when he draws him in his net.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The helpless are crushed. They collapse. They fall under his strength.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He says in his heart, “God has forgotten. He hides his face. He will never see it.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Arise, Yahweh! God, lift up your hand! Don’t forget the helpless.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Why does the wicked person condemn God, and say in his heart, “God won’t call me into account?”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But you do see trouble and grief. You consider it to take it into your hand. You help the victim and the fatherless.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Break the arm of the wicked. As for the evil man, seek out his wickedness until you find none.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh is King forever and ever! The nations will perish out of his land.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh, you have heard the desire of the humble. You will prepare their heart. You will cause your ear to hear,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: to judge the fatherless and the oppressed, that man who is of the earth may terrify no more.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Chief Musician. By David. In Yahweh, I take refuge. How can you say to my soul, “Flee as a bird to your mountain!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For, behold, the wicked bend their bows. They set their arrows on the strings, that they may shoot in darkness at the upright in heart.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: If the foundations are destroyed, what can the righteous do?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh is in his holy temple. Yahweh is on his throne in heaven. His eyes observe. His eyes examine the children of men.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh examines the righteous, but the wicked and him who loves violence his soul hates.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: On the wicked he will rain blazing coals; fire, sulfur, and scorching wind shall be the portion of their cup.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For Yahweh is righteous. He loves righteousness. The upright shall see his face.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Chief Musician; upon an eight-stringed lyre. A Psalm of David. Help, Yahweh; for the godly man ceases. For the faithful fail from among the children of men.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Everyone lies to his neighbor. They speak with flattering lips, and with a double heart.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: May Yahweh cut off all flattering lips, and the tongue that boasts,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who have said, “With our tongue we will prevail. Our lips are our own. Who is lord over us?”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “Because of the oppression of the weak and because of the groaning of the needy, I will now arise,” says Yahweh; “I will set him in safety from those who malign him.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh’s words are flawless words, as silver refined in a clay furnace, purified seven times.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You will keep them, Yahweh. You will preserve them from this generation forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The wicked walk on every side, when what is vile is exalted among the sons of men.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Chief Musician. A Psalm by David. How long, Yahweh? Will you forget me forever? How long will you hide your face from me?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: How long shall I take counsel in my soul, having sorrow in my heart every day? How long shall my enemy triumph over me?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Behold, and answer me, Yahweh, my God. Give light to my eyes, lest I sleep in death;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Lest my enemy say, “I have prevailed against him”; Lest my adversaries rejoice when I fall.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But I trust in your loving kindness. My heart rejoices in your salvation.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will sing to Yahweh, because he has been good to me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Chief Musician. By David. The fool has said in his heart, “There is no God.” They are corrupt. They have done abominable deeds. There is no one who does good.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh looked down from heaven on the children of men, to see if there were any who understood, who sought after God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They have all gone aside. They have together become corrupt. There is no one who does good, no, not one.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Have all the workers of iniquity no knowledge, who eat up my people as they eat bread, and don’t call on Yahweh?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: There they were in great fear, for God is in the generation of the righteous.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You frustrate the plan of the poor, because Yahweh is his refuge.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Oh that the salvation of Israel would come out of Zion! When Yahweh restores the fortunes of his people, then Jacob shall rejoice, and Israel shall be glad.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Psalm by David. Yahweh, who shall dwell in your sanctuary? Who shall live on your holy hill?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He who walks blamelessly does what is right, and speaks truth in his heart;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He who doesn’t slander with his tongue, nor does evil to his friend, nor casts slurs against his fellow man;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In whose eyes a vile man is despised, but who honors those who fear Yahweh; he who keeps an oath even when it hurts, and doesn’t change;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: he who doesn’t lend out his money for usury, nor take a bribe against the innocent. He who does these things shall never be shaken.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Poem by David. Preserve me, God, for in you do I take refuge.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My soul, you have said to Yahweh, “You are my Lord. Apart from you I have no good thing.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: As for the saints who are in the earth, they are the excellent ones in whom is all my delight.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Their sorrows shall be multiplied who give gifts to another god. Their drink offerings of blood I will not offer, nor take their names on my lips.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh assigned my portion and my cup. You made my lot secure.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The lines have fallen to me in pleasant places. Yes, I have a good inheritance.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will bless Yahweh, who has given me counsel. Yes, my heart instructs me in the night seasons.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have set Yahweh always before me. Because he is at my right hand, I shall not be moved.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore my heart is glad, and my tongue rejoices. My body shall also dwell in safety.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For you will not leave my soul in Sheol,  neither will you allow your holy one to see corruption.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You will show me the path of life. In your presence is fullness of joy. In your right hand there are pleasures forever more.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Prayer by David. Hear, Yahweh, my righteous plea; Give ear to my prayer, that doesn’t go out of deceitful lips.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let my sentence come out of your presence. Let your eyes look on equity.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have proved my heart. You have visited me in the night. You have tried me, and found nothing. I have resolved that my mouth shall not disobey.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: As for the deeds of men, by the word of your lips, I have kept myself from the ways of the violent.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My steps have held fast to your paths. My feet have not slipped.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have called on you, for you will answer me, God. Turn your ear to me. Hear my speech.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Show your marvelous loving kindness, you who save those who take refuge by your right hand from their enemies.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Keep me as the apple of your eye. Hide me under the shadow of your wings,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: from the wicked who oppress me, my deadly enemies, who surround me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They close up their callous hearts. With their mouth they speak proudly.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They have now surrounded us in our steps. They set their eyes to cast us down to the earth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He is like a lion that is greedy of his prey, as it were a young lion lurking in secret places.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Arise, Yahweh, confront him. Cast him down. Deliver my soul from the wicked by your sword;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: from men by your hand, Yahweh, from men of the world, whose portion is in this life. You fill the belly of your cherished ones. Your sons have plenty, and they store up wealth for their children.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: As for me, I shall see your face in righteousness. I shall be satisfied, when I awake, with seeing your form.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Chief Musician. By David the servant of Yahweh, who spoke to Yahweh the words of this song in the day that Yahweh delivered him from the hand of all his enemies, and from the hand of Saul. He said, I love you, Yahweh, my strength.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh is my rock, my fortress, and my deliverer; my God, my rock, in whom I take refuge; my shield, and the horn of my salvation, my high tower.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I call on Yahweh, who is worthy to be praised; and I am saved from my enemies.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The cords of death surrounded me. The floods of ungodliness made me afraid.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The cords of Sheol  were around me. The snares of death came on me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In my distress I called on Yahweh, and cried to my God. He heard my voice out of his temple. My cry before him came into his ears.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then the earth shook and trembled. The foundations also of the mountains quaked and were shaken, because he was angry.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Smoke went out of his nostrils. Consuming fire came out of his mouth. Coals were kindled by it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He bowed the heavens also, and came down. Thick darkness was under his feet.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He rode on a cherub, and flew. Yes, he soared on the wings of the wind.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He made darkness his hiding place, his pavilion around him, darkness of waters, thick clouds of the skies.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: At the brightness before him his thick clouds passed, hailstones and coals of fire.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh also thundered in the sky. The Most High uttered his voice: hailstones and coals of fire.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He sent out his arrows, and scattered them; Yes, great lightning bolts, and routed them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then the channels of waters appeared. The foundations of the world were laid bare at your rebuke, Yahweh, at the blast of the breath of your nostrils.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He sent from on high. He took me. He drew me out of many waters.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He delivered me from my strong enemy, from those who hated me; for they were too mighty for me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They came on me in the day of my calamity, but Yahweh was my support.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He brought me out also into a large place. He delivered me, because he delighted in me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh has rewarded me according to my righteousness. According to the cleanness of my hands has he recompensed me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For I have kept the ways of Yahweh, and have not wickedly departed from my God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For all his ordinances were before me. I didn’t put away his statutes from me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I was also blameless with him. I kept myself from my iniquity.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore Yahweh has rewarded me according to my righteousness, according to the cleanness of my hands in his eyesight.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: With the merciful you will show yourself merciful. With the perfect man, you will show yourself perfect.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: With the pure, you will show yourself pure. With the crooked you will show yourself shrewd.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For you will save the afflicted people, but the haughty eyes you will bring down.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For you will light my lamp, Yahweh. My God will light up my darkness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For by you, I advance through a troop. By my God, I leap over a wall.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: As for God, his way is perfect. Yahweh’s word is tried. He is a shield to all those who take refuge in him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For who is God, except Yahweh? Who is a rock, besides our God,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: the God who arms me with strength, and makes my way perfect?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He makes my feet like deer’s feet, and sets me on my high places.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He teaches my hands to war, so that my arms bend a bow of bronze.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have also given me the shield of your salvation. Your right hand sustains me. Your gentleness has made me great.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have enlarged my steps under me, My feet have not slipped.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will pursue my enemies, and overtake them. Neither will I turn again until they are consumed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will strike them through, so that they will not be able to rise. They shall fall under my feet.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For you have armed me with strength to the battle. You have subdued under me those who rose up against me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have also made my enemies turn their backs to me, that I might cut off those who hate me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They cried, but there was no one to save; even to Yahweh, but he didn’t answer them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then I beat them small as the dust before the wind. I cast them out as the mire of the streets.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have delivered me from the strivings of the people. You have made me the head of the nations. A people whom I have not known shall serve me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: As soon as they hear of me they shall obey me. The foreigners shall submit themselves to me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The foreigners shall fade away, and shall come trembling out of their close places.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh lives; and blessed be my rock. Exalted be the God of my salvation,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: even the God who executes vengeance for me, and subdues peoples under me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He rescues me from my enemies. Yes, you lift me up above those who rise up against me. You deliver me from the violent man.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore I will give thanks to you, Yahweh, among the nations, and will sing praises to your name.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He gives great deliverance to his king, and shows loving kindness to his anointed, to David and to his offspring,  forever more.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Chief Musician. A Psalm by David. The heavens declare the glory of God. The expanse shows his handiwork.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Day after day they pour out speech, and night after night they display knowledge.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: There is no speech nor language, where their voice is not heard.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Their voice has gone out through all the earth, their words to the end of the world. In them he has set a tent for the sun,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: which is as a bridegroom coming out of his room, like a strong man rejoicing to run his course.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: His going out is from the end of the heavens, his circuit to its ends; There is nothing hidden from its heat.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh’s law is perfect, restoring the soul. Yahweh’s testimony is sure, making wise the simple.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh’s precepts are right, rejoicing the heart. Yahweh’s commandment is pure, enlightening the eyes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The fear of Yahweh is clean, enduring forever. Yahweh’s ordinances are true, and righteous altogether.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: More to be desired are they than gold, yes, than much fine gold; sweeter also than honey and the extract of the honeycomb.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Moreover by them is your servant warned. In keeping them there is great reward.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Who can discern his errors? Forgive me from hidden errors.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Keep back your servant also from presumptuous sins. Let them not have dominion over me. Then I will be upright. I will be blameless and innocent of great transgression.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let the words of my mouth and the meditation of my heart be acceptable in your sight, Yahweh, my rock, and my redeemer.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Chief Musician. A Psalm by David. May Yahweh answer you in the day of trouble. May the name of the God of Jacob set you up on high,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: send you help from the sanctuary, grant you support from Zion,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: remember all your offerings, and accept your burned sacrifice. Selah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: May He grant you your heart’s desire, and fulfill all your counsel.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: We will triumph in your salvation. In the name of our God, we will set up our banners. May Yahweh grant all your requests.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Now I know that Yahweh saves his anointed. He will answer him from his holy heaven, with the saving strength of his right hand.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Some trust in chariots, and some in horses, but we trust the name of Yahweh our God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They are bowed down and fallen, but we rise up, and stand upright.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Save, Yahweh! Let the King answer us when we call!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Chief Musician. A Psalm by David. The king rejoices in your strength, Yahweh! How greatly he rejoices in your salvation!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have given him his heart’s desire, and have not withheld the request of his lips. Selah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For you meet him with the blessings of goodness. You set a crown of fine gold on his head.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He asked life of you, you gave it to him, even length of days forever and ever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: His glory is great in your salvation. You lay honor and majesty on him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For you make him most blessed forever. You make him glad with joy in your presence.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the king trusts in Yahweh. Through the loving kindness of the Most High, he shall not be moved.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Your hand will find out all of your enemies. Your right hand will find out those who hate you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You will make them as a fiery furnace in the time of your anger. Yahweh will swallow them up in his wrath. The fire shall devour them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You will destroy their descendants from the earth, their posterity from among the children of men.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For they intended evil against you. They plotted evil against you which cannot succeed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For you will make them turn their back, when you aim drawn bows at their face.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Be exalted, Yahweh, in your strength, so we will sing and praise your power.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Chief Musician; set to “The Doe of the Morning.” A Psalm by David. My God, my God, why have you forsaken me? Why are you so far from helping me, and from the words of my groaning?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My God, I cry in the daytime, but you don’t answer; in the night season, and am not silent.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But you are holy, you who inhabit the praises of Israel.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Our fathers trusted in you. They trusted, and you delivered them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They cried to you, and were delivered. They trusted in you, and were not disappointed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But I am a worm, and no man; a reproach of men, and despised by the people.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All those who see me mock me. They insult me with their lips. They shake their heads, saying,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “He trusts in Yahweh; let him deliver him. Let him rescue him, since he delights in him.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But you brought me out of the womb. You made me trust while at my mother’s breasts.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I was thrown on you from my mother’s womb. You are my God since my mother bore me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Don’t be far from me, for trouble is near. For there is no one to help.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Many bulls have surrounded me. Strong bulls of Bashan have encircled me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They open their mouths wide against me, lions tearing prey and roaring.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I am poured out like water. All my bones are out of joint. My heart is like wax; it is melted within me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My strength is dried up like a potsherd. My tongue sticks to the roof of my mouth. You have brought me into the dust of death.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For dogs have surrounded me. A company of evildoers have enclosed me. They have pierced my hands and feet.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I can count all of my bones. They look and stare at me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They divide my garments among them. They cast lots for my clothing.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But don’t be far off, Yahweh. You are my help: hurry to help me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Deliver my soul from the sword, my precious life from the power of the dog.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Save me from the lion’s mouth! Yes, from the horns of the wild oxen, you have answered me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will declare your name to my brothers. Among the assembly, I will praise you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You who fear Yahweh, praise him! All you descendants of Jacob, glorify him! Stand in awe of him, all you descendants of Israel!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For he has not despised nor abhorred the affliction of the afflicted, Neither has he hidden his face from him; but when he cried to him, he heard.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Of you comes my praise in the great assembly. I will pay my vows before those who fear him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The humble shall eat and be satisfied. They shall praise Yahweh who seek after him. Let your hearts live forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All the ends of the earth shall remember and turn to Yahweh. All the relatives of the nations shall worship before you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the kingdom is Yahweh’s. He is the ruler over the nations.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All the rich ones of the earth shall eat and worship. All those who go down to the dust shall bow before him, even he who can’t keep his soul alive.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Posterity shall serve him. Future generations shall be told about the Lord.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They shall come and shall declare his righteousness to a people that shall be born, for he has done it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Psalm by David. Yahweh is my shepherd: I shall lack nothing.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He makes me lie down in green pastures. He leads me beside still waters.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He restores my soul. He guides me in the paths of righteousness for his name’s sake.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Even though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil, for you are with me. Your rod and your staff, they comfort me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You prepare a table before me in the presence of my enemies. You anoint my head with oil. My cup runs over.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Surely goodness and loving kindness shall follow me all the days of my life, and I will dwell in Yahweh’s house forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Psalm by David. The earth is Yahweh’s, with its fullness; the world, and those who dwell therein.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For he has founded it on the seas, and established it on the floods.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Who may ascend to Yahweh’s hill? Who may stand in his holy place?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He who has clean hands and a pure heart; who has not lifted up his soul to falsehood, and has not sworn deceitfully.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He shall receive a blessing from Yahweh, righteousness from the God of his salvation.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: This is the generation of those who seek Him, who seek your face — even Jacob. Selah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Lift up your heads, you gates! Be lifted up, you everlasting doors, and the King of glory will come in.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Who is the King of glory? Yahweh strong and mighty, Yahweh mighty in battle.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Lift up your heads, you gates; yes, lift them up, you everlasting doors, and the King of glory will come in.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Who is this King of glory? Yahweh of Armies is the King of glory! Selah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By David. To you, Yahweh, do I lift up my soul.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My God, I have trusted in you. Don’t let me be shamed. Don’t let my enemies triumph over me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yes, no one who waits for you shall be shamed. They shall be shamed who deal treacherously without cause.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Show me your ways, Yahweh. Teach me your paths.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Guide me in your truth, and teach me, For you are the God of my salvation, I wait for you all day long.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh, remember your tender mercies and your loving kindness, for they are from old times.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Don’t remember the sins of my youth, nor my transgressions. Remember me according to your loving kindness, for your goodness’ sake, Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Good and upright is Yahweh, therefore he will instruct sinners in the way.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He will guide the humble in justice. He will teach the humble his way.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All the paths of Yahweh are loving kindness and truth to such as keep his covenant and his testimonies.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For your name’s sake, Yahweh, pardon my iniquity, for it is great.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: What man is he who fears Yahweh? He shall instruct him in the way that he shall choose.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: His soul shall dwell at ease. His offspring  shall inherit the land.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The friendship of Yahweh is with those who fear him. He will show them his covenant.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My eyes are ever on Yahweh, for he will pluck my feet out of the net.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Turn to me, and have mercy on me, for I am desolate and afflicted.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The troubles of my heart are enlarged. Oh bring me out of my distresses.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Consider my affliction and my travail. Forgive all my sins.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Consider my enemies, for they are many. They hate me with cruel hatred.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Oh keep my soul, and deliver me. Let me not be disappointed, for I take refuge in you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let integrity and uprightness preserve me, for I wait for you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Redeem Israel, God, out all of his troubles.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By David. Judge me, Yahweh, for I have walked in my integrity. I have trusted also in Yahweh without wavering.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Examine me, Yahweh, and prove me. Try my heart and my mind.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For your loving kindness is before my eyes. I have walked in your truth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have not sat with deceitful men, neither will I go in with hypocrites.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I hate the assembly of evildoers, and will not sit with the wicked.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will wash my hands in innocence, so I will go about your altar, Yahweh;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: that I may make the voice of thanksgiving to be heard, and tell of all your wondrous deeds.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh, I love the habitation of your house, the place where your glory dwells.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Don’t gather my soul with sinners, nor my life with bloodthirsty men;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: in whose hands is wickedness, their right hand is full of bribes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But as for me, I will walk in my integrity. Redeem me, and be merciful to me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My foot stands in an even place. In the congregations I will bless Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By David. Yahweh is my light and my salvation. Whom shall I fear? Yahweh is the strength of my life. Of whom shall I be afraid?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When evildoers came at me to eat up my flesh, even my adversaries and my foes, they stumbled and fell.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Though an army should encamp against me, my heart shall not fear. Though war should rise against me, even then I will be confident.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: One thing I have asked of Yahweh, that I will seek after: that I may dwell in Yahweh’s house all the days of my life, to see Yahweh’s beauty, and to inquire in his temple.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For in the day of trouble he will keep me secretly in his pavilion. In the covert of his tabernacle he will hide me. He will lift me up on a rock.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Now my head will be lifted up above my enemies around me; I will offer sacrifices of joy in his tent. I will sing, yes, I will sing praises to Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Hear, Yahweh, when I cry with my voice. Have mercy also on me, and answer me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When you said, “Seek my face,” my heart said to you, “I will seek your face, Yahweh.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Don’t hide your face from me. Don’t put your servant away in anger. You have been my help. Don’t abandon me, neither forsake me, God of my salvation.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When my father and my mother forsake me, then Yahweh will take me up.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Teach me your way, Yahweh. Lead me in a straight path, because of my enemies.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Don’t deliver me over to the desire of my adversaries, for false witnesses have risen up against me, such as breathe out cruelty.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I am still confident of this: I will see the goodness of Yahweh in the land of the living.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Wait for Yahweh. Be strong, and let your heart take courage. Yes, wait for Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By David. To you, Yahweh, I call. My rock, don’t be deaf to me; lest, if you are silent to me, I would become like those who go down into the pit.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Hear the voice of my petitions, when I cry to you, when I lift up my hands toward your Most Holy Place.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Don’t draw me away with the wicked, with the workers of iniquity who speak peace with their neighbors, but mischief is in their hearts.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Give them according to their work, and according to the wickedness of their doings. Give them according to the operation of their hands. Bring back on them what they deserve.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Because they don’t respect the works of Yahweh, nor the operation of his hands, he will break them down and not build them up.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Blessed be Yahweh, because he has heard the voice of my petitions.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh is my strength and my shield. My heart has trusted in him, and I am helped. Therefore my heart greatly rejoices. With my song I will thank him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh is their strength. He is a stronghold of salvation to his anointed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Save your people, and bless your inheritance. Be their shepherd also, and bear them up forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Psalm by David. Ascribe to Yahweh, you sons of the mighty, ascribe to Yahweh glory and strength.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Ascribe to Yahweh the glory due to his name. Worship Yahweh in holy array.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh’s voice is on the waters. The God of glory thunders, even Yahweh on many waters.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh’s voice is powerful. Yahweh’s voice is full of majesty.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh’s voice breaks the cedars. Yes, Yahweh breaks in pieces the cedars of Lebanon.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He makes them also to skip like a calf; Lebanon and Sirion like a young, wild ox.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh’s voice strikes with flashes of lightning.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh’s voice shakes the wilderness. Yahweh shakes the wilderness of Kadesh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh’s voice makes the deer calve, and strips the forests bare. In his temple everything says, “Glory!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh sat enthroned at the Flood. Yes, Yahweh sits as King forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh will give strength to his people. Yahweh will bless his people with peace.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Psalm. A Song for the Dedication of the Temple. By David. I will extol you, Yahweh, for you have raised me up, and have not made my foes to rejoice over me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh my God, I cried to you, and you have healed me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh, you have brought up my soul from Sheol.  You have kept me alive, that I should not go down to the pit.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Sing praise to Yahweh, you saints of his. Give thanks to his holy name.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For his anger is but for a moment. His favor is for a lifetime. Weeping may stay for the night, but joy comes in the morning.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: As for me, I said in my prosperity, “I shall never be moved.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You, Yahweh, when you favored me, made my mountain stand strong; but when you hid your face, I was troubled.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I cried to you, Yahweh. I made supplication to the Lord:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “What profit is there in my destruction, if I go down to the pit? Shall the dust praise you? Shall it declare your truth?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Hear, Yahweh, and have mercy on me. Yahweh, be my helper.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have turned my mourning into dancing for me. You have removed my sackcloth, and clothed me with gladness,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: To the end that my heart may sing praise to you, and not be silent. Yahweh my God, I will give thanks to you forever!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Chief Musician. A Psalm by David. In you, Yahweh, I take refuge. Let me never be disappointed. Deliver me in your righteousness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Bow down your ear to me. Deliver me speedily. Be to me a strong rock, a house of defense to save me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For you are my rock and my fortress, therefore for your name’s sake lead me and guide me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Pluck me out of the net that they have laid secretly for me, for you are my stronghold.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Into your hand I commend my spirit. You redeem me, Yahweh, God of truth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I hate those who regard lying vanities, but I trust in Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will be glad and rejoice in your loving kindness, for you have seen my affliction. You have known my soul in adversities.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have not shut me up into the hand of the enemy. You have set my feet in a large place.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Have mercy on me, Yahweh, for I am in distress. My eye, my soul, and my body waste away with grief.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For my life is spent with sorrow, my years with sighing. My strength fails because of my iniquity. My bones are wasted away.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Because of all my adversaries I have become utterly contemptible to my neighbors, A fear to my acquaintances. Those who saw me on the street fled from me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I am forgotten from their hearts like a dead man. I am like broken pottery.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For I have heard the slander of many, terror on every side, while they conspire together against me, they plot to take away my life.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But I trust in you, Yahweh. I said, “You are my God.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My times are in your hand. Deliver me from the hand of my enemies, and from those who persecute me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Make your face to shine on your servant. Save me in your loving kindness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let me not be disappointed, Yahweh, for I have called on you. Let the wicked be disappointed. Let them be silent in Sheol.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let the lying lips be mute, which speak against the righteous insolently, with pride and contempt.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Oh how great is your goodness, which you have laid up for those who fear you, which you have worked for those who take refuge in you, before the sons of men!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In the shelter of your presence you will hide them from the plotting of man. You will keep them secretly in a dwelling away from the strife of tongues.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise be to Yahweh, for he has shown me his marvelous loving kindness in a strong city.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: As for me, I said in my haste, “I am cut off from before your eyes.” Nevertheless you heard the voice of my petitions when I cried to you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Oh love Yahweh, all you his saints! Yahweh preserves the faithful, and fully recompenses him who behaves arrogantly.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Be strong, and let your heart take courage, all you who hope in Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By David. A contemplative psalm. Blessed is he whose disobedience is forgiven, whose sin is covered.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Blessed is the man to whom Yahweh doesn’t impute iniquity, in whose spirit there is no deceit.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When I kept silence, my bones wasted away through my groaning all day long.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For day and night your hand was heavy on me. My strength was sapped in the heat of summer. Selah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I acknowledged my sin to you. I didn’t hide my iniquity. I said, I will confess my transgressions to Yahweh, and you forgave the iniquity of my sin. Selah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For this, let everyone who is godly pray to you in a time when you may be found. Surely when the great waters overflow, they shall not reach to him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You are my hiding place. You will preserve me from trouble. You will surround me with songs of deliverance. Selah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will instruct you and teach you in the way which you shall go. I will counsel you with my eye on you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Don’t be like the horse, or like the mule, which have no understanding, who are controlled by bit and bridle, or else they will not come near to you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Many sorrows come to the wicked, but loving kindness shall surround him who trusts in Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Be glad in Yahweh, and rejoice, you righteous! Shout for joy, all you who are upright in heart!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Rejoice in Yahweh, you righteous! Praise is fitting for the upright.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Give thanks to Yahweh with the lyre. Sing praises to him with the harp of ten strings.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Sing to him a new song. Play skillfully with a shout of joy!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For Yahweh’s word is right. All his work is done in faithfulness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He loves righteousness and justice. The earth is full of the loving kindness of Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By Yahweh’s word, the heavens were made; all their army by the breath of his mouth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He gathers the waters of the sea together as a heap. He lays up the deeps in storehouses.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let all the earth fear Yahweh. Let all the inhabitants of the world stand in awe of him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For he spoke, and it was done. He commanded, and it stood firm.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh brings the counsel of the nations to nothing. He makes the thoughts of the peoples to be of no effect.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The counsel of Yahweh stands fast forever, the thoughts of his heart to all generations.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Blessed is the nation whose God is Yahweh, the people whom he has chosen for his own inheritance.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh looks from heaven. He sees all the sons of men.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: From the place of his habitation he looks out on all the inhabitants of the earth,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: he who fashions all of their hearts; and he considers all of their works.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: There is no king saved by the multitude of an army. A mighty man is not delivered by great strength.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A horse is a vain thing for safety, neither does he deliver any by his great power.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Behold, Yahweh’s eye is on those who fear him, on those who hope in his loving kindness;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: to deliver their soul from death, to keep them alive in famine.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Our soul has waited for Yahweh. He is our help and our shield.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For our heart rejoices in him, because we have trusted in his holy name.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let your loving kindness be on us, Yahweh, since we have hoped in you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By David; when he pretended to be insane before Abimelech, who drove him away, and he departed. I will bless Yahweh at all times. His praise will always be in my mouth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My soul shall boast in Yahweh. The humble shall hear of it, and be glad.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Oh magnify Yahweh with me. Let us exalt his name together.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I sought Yahweh, and he answered me, and delivered me from all my fears.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They looked to him, and were radiant. Their faces shall never be covered with shame.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: This poor man cried, and Yahweh heard him, and saved him out of all his troubles.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh’s angel encamps around those who fear him, and delivers them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Oh taste and see that Yahweh is good. Blessed is the man who takes refuge in him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Oh fear Yahweh, you his saints, for there is no lack with those who fear him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The young lions do lack, and suffer hunger, but those who seek Yahweh shall not lack any good thing.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Come, you children, listen to me. I will teach you the fear of Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Who is someone who desires life, and loves many days, that he may see good?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Keep your tongue from evil, and your lips from speaking lies.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Depart from evil, and do good. seek peace, and pursue it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh’s eyes are toward the righteous. His ears listen to their cry.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh’s face is against those who do evil, to cut off their memory from the earth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The righteous cry, and Yahweh hears, and delivers them out of all their troubles.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh is near to those who have a broken heart, and saves those who have a crushed spirit.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Many are the afflictions of the righteous, but Yahweh delivers him out of them all.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He protects all of his bones. Not one of them is broken.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Evil shall kill the wicked. Those who hate the righteous shall be condemned.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh redeems the soul of his servants. None of those who take refuge in him shall be condemned.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By David. Contend, Yahweh, with those who contend with me. Fight against those who fight against me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Take hold of shield and buckler, and stand up for my help.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Brandish the spear and block those who pursue me. Tell my soul, “I am your salvation.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let those who seek after my soul be disappointed and brought to dishonor. Let those who plot my ruin be turned back and confounded.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let them be as chaff before the wind, Yahweh’s angel driving them on.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let their way be dark and slippery, Yahweh’s angel pursuing them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For without cause they have hidden their net in a pit for me. Without cause they have dug a pit for my soul.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let destruction come on him unawares. Let his net that he has hidden catch himself. Let him fall into that destruction.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My soul shall be joyful in Yahweh. It shall rejoice in his salvation.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All my bones shall say, “Yahweh, who is like you, who delivers the poor from him who is too strong for him; yes, the poor and the needy from him who robs him?”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Unrighteous witnesses rise up. They ask me about things that I don’t know about.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They reward me evil for good, to the bereaving of my soul.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But as for me, when they were sick, my clothing was sackcloth. I afflicted my soul with fasting. My prayer returned into my own bosom.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I behaved myself as though it had been my friend or my brother. I bowed down mourning, as one who mourns his mother.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But in my adversity, they rejoiced, and gathered themselves together. The attackers gathered themselves together against me, and I didn’t know it. They tore at me, and didn’t cease.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Like the profane mockers in feasts, they gnashed their teeth at me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Lord, how long will you look on? Rescue my soul from their destruction, my precious life from the lions.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will give you thanks in the great assembly. I will praise you among many people.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Don’t let those who are my enemies wrongfully rejoice over me; neither let those who hate me without a cause wink their eyes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For they don’t speak peace, but they devise deceitful words against those who are quiet in the land.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yes, they opened their mouth wide against me. They said, “Aha! Aha! Our eye has seen it!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have seen it, Yahweh. Don’t keep silent. Lord, don’t be far from me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Wake up! Rise up to defend me, my God! My Lord, contend for me!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Vindicate me, Yahweh my God, according to your righteousness. Don’t let them gloat over me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Don’t let them say in their heart, “Aha! That’s the way we want it!” Don’t let them say, “We have swallowed him up!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let them be disappointed and confounded together who rejoice at my calamity. Let them be clothed with shame and dishonor who magnify themselves against me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let them shout for joy and be glad, who favor my righteous cause. Yes, let them say continually, “Yahweh be magnified, who has pleasure in the prosperity of his servant!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My tongue shall talk about your righteousness and about your praise all day long.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Chief Musician. By David, the servant of Yahweh. An inner sanctuary is within my heart about the disobedience of the wicked: “There is no fear of God before his eyes.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For he flatters himself in his own eyes, too much to detect and hate his sin.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The words of his mouth are iniquity and deceit. He has ceased to be wise and to do good.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He plots iniquity on his bed. He sets himself in a way that is not good. He doesn’t abhor evil.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Your loving kindness, Yahweh, is in the heavens. Your faithfulness reaches to the skies.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Your righteousness is like the mountains of God. Your judgments are like a great deep. Yahweh, you preserve man and animal.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: How precious is your loving kindness, God! The children of men take refuge under the shadow of your wings.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They shall be abundantly satisfied with the abundance of your house. You will make them drink of the river of your pleasures.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For with you is the spring of life. In your light shall we see light.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Oh continue your loving kindness to those who know you, your righteousness to the upright in heart.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Don’t let the foot of pride come against me. Don’t let the hand of the wicked drive me away.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: There the workers of iniquity are fallen. They are thrust down, and shall not be able to rise.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By David. Don’t fret because of evildoers, neither be envious against those who work unrighteousness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For they shall soon be cut down like the grass, and wither like the green herb.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Trust in Yahweh, and do good. Dwell in the land, and enjoy safe pasture.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Also delight yourself in Yahweh, and he will give you the desires of your heart.

translations.name: World English Bible
