translations.text: You answered them, Yahweh our God. You are a God who forgave them, although you took vengeance for their doings.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Exalt Yahweh, our God. Worship at his holy hill, for Yahweh, our God, is holy!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Psalm of thanksgiving. Shout for joy to Yahweh, all you lands!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Serve Yahweh with gladness. Come before his presence with singing.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Know that Yahweh, he is God. It is he who has made us, and we are his. We are his people, and the sheep of his pasture.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Enter into his gates with thanksgiving, into his courts with praise. Give thanks to him, and bless his name.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For Yahweh is good. His loving kindness endures forever, his faithfulness to all generations.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Psalm by David. I will sing of loving kindness and justice. To you, Yahweh, I will sing praises.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will be careful to live a blameless life. When will you come to me? I will walk within my house with a blameless heart.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will set no vile thing before my eyes. I hate the deeds of faithless men. They will not cling to me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A perverse heart will be far from me. I will have nothing to do with evil.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will silence whoever secretly slanders his neighbor. I won’t tolerate one who is haughty and conceited.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My eyes will be on the faithful of the land, that they may dwell with me. He who walks in a perfect way, he will serve me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He who practices deceit won’t dwell within my house. He who speaks falsehood won’t be established before my eyes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Morning by morning, I will destroy all the wicked of the land; to cut off all the workers of iniquity from Yahweh’s city.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Prayer of the afflicted, when he is overwhelmed and pours out his complaint before Yahweh. Hear my prayer, Yahweh! Let my cry come to you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Don’t hide your face from me in the day of my distress. Turn your ear to me. Answer me quickly in the day when I call.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For my days consume away like smoke. My bones are burned as a torch.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My heart is blighted like grass, and withered, for I forget to eat my bread.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By reason of the voice of my groaning, my bones stick to my skin.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I am like a pelican of the wilderness. I have become as an owl of the waste places.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I watch, and have become like a sparrow that is alone on the housetop.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My enemies reproach me all day. Those who are mad at me use my name as a curse.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For I have eaten ashes like bread, and mixed my drink with tears,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Because of your indignation and your wrath, for you have taken me up, and thrown me away.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My days are like a long shadow. I have withered like grass.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But you, Yahweh, will remain forever; your renown endures to all generations.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You will arise and have mercy on Zion; for it is time to have pity on her. Yes, the set time has come.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For your servants take pleasure in her stones, and have pity on her dust.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: So the nations will fear Yahweh’s name; all the kings of the earth your glory.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For Yahweh has built up Zion. He has appeared in his glory.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has responded to the prayer of the destitute, and has not despised their prayer.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: This will be written for the generation to come. A people which will be created will praise Yah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For he has looked down from the height of his sanctuary. From heaven, Yahweh saw the earth;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: to hear the groans of the prisoner; to free those who are condemned to death;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: that men may declare Yahweh’s name in Zion, and his praise in Jerusalem;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: when the peoples are gathered together, the kingdoms, to serve Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He weakened my strength along the course. He shortened my days.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I said, “My God, don’t take me away in the middle of my days. Your years are throughout all generations.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Of old, you laid the foundation of the earth. The heavens are the work of your hands.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They will perish, but you will endure. Yes, all of them will wear out like a garment. You will change them like a cloak, and they will be changed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But you are the same. Your years will have no end.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The children of your servants will continue. Their offspring  will be established before you.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By David. Praise Yahweh, my soul! All that is within me, praise his holy name!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise Yahweh, my soul, and don’t forget all his benefits;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who forgives all your sins; who heals all your diseases;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who redeems your life from destruction; who crowns you with loving kindness and tender mercies;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who satisfies your desire with good things, so that your youth is renewed like the eagle’s.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh executes righteous acts, and justice for all who are oppressed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He made known his ways to Moses, his deeds to the children of Israel.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh is merciful and gracious, slow to anger, and abundant in loving kindness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He will not always accuse; neither will he stay angry forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has not dealt with us according to our sins, nor repaid us for our iniquities.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For as the heavens are high above the earth, so great is his loving kindness toward those who fear him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: As far as the east is from the west, so far has he removed our transgressions from us.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Like a father has compassion on his children, so Yahweh has compassion on those who fear him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For he knows how we are made. He remembers that we are dust.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: As for man, his days are like grass. As a flower of the field, so he flourishes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the wind passes over it, and it is gone. Its place remembers it no more.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But Yahweh’s loving kindness is from everlasting to everlasting with those who fear him, his righteousness to children’s children;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: to those who keep his covenant, to those who remember to obey his precepts.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh has established his throne in the heavens. His kingdom rules over all.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise Yahweh, you angels of his, who are mighty in strength, who fulfill his word, obeying the voice of his word.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise Yahweh, all you armies of his, you servants of his, who do his pleasure.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise Yahweh, all you works of his, in all places of his dominion. Praise Yahweh, my soul!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Bless Yahweh, my soul. Yahweh, my God, you are very great. You are clothed with honor and majesty.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He covers himself with light as with a garment. He stretches out the heavens like a curtain.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He lays the beams of his rooms in the waters. He makes the clouds his chariot. He walks on the wings of the wind.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He makes his messengers  winds; his servants flames of fire.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He laid the foundations of the earth, that it should not be moved forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You covered it with the deep as with a cloak. The waters stood above the mountains.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: At your rebuke they fled. At the voice of your thunder they hurried away.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The mountains rose, the valleys sank down, to the place which you had assigned to them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have set a boundary that they may not pass over; that they don’t turn again to cover the earth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He sends springs into the valleys. They run among the mountains.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They give drink to every animal of the field. The wild donkeys quench their thirst.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The birds of the sky nest by them. They sing among the branches.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He waters the mountains from his rooms. The earth is filled with the fruit of your works.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He causes the grass to grow for the livestock, and plants for man to cultivate, that he may produce food out of the earth:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: wine that makes glad the heart of man, oil to make his face to shine, and bread that strengthens man’s heart.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh’s trees are well watered, the cedars of Lebanon, which he has planted;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: where the birds make their nests. The stork makes its home in the cypress trees.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The high mountains are for the wild goats. The rocks are a refuge for the rock badgers.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He appointed the moon for seasons. The sun knows when to set.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You make darkness, and it is night, in which all the animals of the forest prowl.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The young lions roar after their prey, and seek their food from God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The sun rises, and they steal away, and lay down in their dens.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Man goes out to his work, to his labor until the evening.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh, how many are your works! In wisdom have you made them all. The earth is full of your riches.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: There is the sea, great and wide, in which are innumerable living things, both small and large animals.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: There the ships go, and leviathan, whom you formed to play there.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: These all wait for you, that you may give them their food in due season.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You give to them; they gather. You open your hand; they are satisfied with good.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You hide your face: they are troubled; you take away their breath: they die, and return to the dust.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You send out your Spirit and they are created. You renew the face of the ground.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let Yahweh’s glory endure forever. Let Yahweh rejoice in his works.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He looks at the earth, and it trembles. He touches the mountains, and they smoke.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will sing to Yahweh as long as I live. I will sing praise to my God while I have any being.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let my meditation be sweet to him. I will rejoice in Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let sinners be consumed out of the earth. Let the wicked be no more. Bless Yahweh, my soul. Praise Yah!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Give thanks to Yahweh! Call on his name! Make his doings known among the peoples.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Sing to him, sing praises to him! Tell of all his marvelous works.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Glory in his holy name. Let the heart of those who seek Yahweh rejoice.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Seek Yahweh and his strength. Seek his face forever more.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Remember his marvelous works that he has done; his wonders, and the judgments of his mouth,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: you offspring  of Abraham, his servant, you children of Jacob, his chosen ones.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He is Yahweh, our God. His judgments are in all the earth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has remembered his covenant forever, the word which he commanded to a thousand generations,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: the covenant which he made with Abraham, his oath to Isaac,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and confirmed the same to Jacob for a statute; to Israel for an everlasting covenant,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: saying, “To you I will give the land of Canaan, the lot of your inheritance”;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: when they were but a few men in number, yes, very few, and foreigners in it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They went about from nation to nation, from one kingdom to another people.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He allowed no one to do them wrong. Yes, he reproved kings for their sakes,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “Don’t touch my anointed ones! Do my prophets no harm!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He called for a famine on the land. He destroyed the food supplies.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He sent a man before them. Joseph was sold for a slave.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They bruised his feet with shackles. His neck was locked in irons,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: until the time that his word happened, and Yahweh’s word proved him true.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The king sent and freed him; even the ruler of peoples, and let him go free.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He made him lord of his house, and ruler of all of his possessions;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: to discipline his princes at his pleasure, and to teach his elders wisdom.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Israel also came into Egypt. Jacob lived in the land of Ham.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He increased his people greatly, and made them stronger than their adversaries.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He turned their heart to hate his people, to conspire against his servants.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He sent Moses, his servant, and Aaron, whom he had chosen.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They performed miracles among them, and wonders in the land of Ham.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He sent darkness, and made it dark. They didn’t rebel against his words.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He turned their waters into blood, and killed their fish.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Their land swarmed with frogs, even in the rooms of their kings.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He spoke, and swarms of flies came, and lice in all their borders.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He gave them hail for rain, with lightning in their land.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He struck their vines and also their fig trees, and shattered the trees of their country.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He spoke, and the locusts came, and the grasshoppers, without number,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: ate up every plant in their land; and ate up the fruit of their ground.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He struck also all the firstborn in their land, the first fruits of all their manhood.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He brought them out with silver and gold. There was not one feeble person among his tribes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Egypt was glad when they departed, for the fear of them had fallen on them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He spread a cloud for a covering, fire to give light in the night.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They asked, and he brought quails, and satisfied them with the bread of the sky.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He opened the rock, and waters gushed out. They ran as a river in the dry places.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For he remembered his holy word, and Abraham, his servant.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He brought his people out with joy, his chosen with singing.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He gave them the lands of the nations. They took the labor of the peoples in possession,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: that they might keep his statutes, and observe his laws. Praise Yah!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise Yahweh! Give thanks to Yahweh, for he is good, for his loving kindness endures forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Who can utter the mighty acts of Yahweh, or fully declare all his praise?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Blessed are those who keep justice. Blessed is one who does what is right at all times.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Remember me, Yahweh, with the favor that you show to your people. Visit me with your salvation,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: that I may see the prosperity of your chosen, that I may rejoice in the gladness of your nation, that I may glory with your inheritance.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: We have sinned with our fathers. We have committed iniquity. We have done wickedly.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Our fathers didn’t understand your wonders in Egypt. They didn’t remember the multitude of your loving kindnesses, but were rebellious at the sea, even at the Red Sea.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Nevertheless he saved them for his name’s sake, that he might make his mighty power known.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He rebuked the Red Sea also, and it was dried up; so he led them through the depths, as through a desert.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He saved them from the hand of him who hated them, and redeemed them from the hand of the enemy.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The waters covered their adversaries. There was not one of them left.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then they believed his words. They sang his praise.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They soon forgot his works. They didn’t wait for his counsel,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: but gave in to craving in the desert, and tested God in the wasteland.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He gave them their request, but sent leanness into their soul.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They envied Moses also in the camp, and Aaron, Yahweh’s saint.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The earth opened and swallowed up Dathan, and covered the company of Abiram.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A fire was kindled in their company. The flame burned up the wicked.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They made a calf in Horeb, and worshiped a molten image.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Thus they exchanged their glory for an image of a bull that eats grass.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They forgot God, their Savior, who had done great things in Egypt,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Wondrous works in the land of Ham, and awesome things by the Red Sea.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore he said that he would destroy them, had Moses, his chosen, not stood before him in the breach, to turn away his wrath, so that he wouldn’t destroy them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yes, they despised the pleasant land. They didn’t believe his word,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: but murmured in their tents, and didn’t listen to Yahweh’s voice.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore he swore to them that he would overthrow them in the wilderness,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: that he would overthrow their offspring  among the nations, and scatter them in the lands.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They joined themselves also to Baal Peor, and ate the sacrifices of the dead.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Thus they provoked him to anger with their deeds. The plague broke in on them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then Phinehas stood up, and executed judgment, so the plague was stopped.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: That was credited to him for righteousness, for all generations to come.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They angered him also at the waters of Meribah, so that Moses was troubled for their sakes;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: because they were rebellious against his spirit, he spoke rashly with his lips.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They didn’t destroy the peoples, as Yahweh commanded them,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: but mixed themselves with the nations, and learned their works.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They served their idols, which became a snare to them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yes, they sacrificed their sons and their daughters to demons.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They shed innocent blood, even the blood of their sons and of their daughters, whom they sacrificed to the idols of Canaan. The land was polluted with blood.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Thus were they defiled with their works, and prostituted themselves in their deeds.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore Yahweh burned with anger against his people. He abhorred his inheritance.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He gave them into the hand of the nations. Those who hated them ruled over them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Their enemies also oppressed them. They were brought into subjection under their hand.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He rescued them many times, but they were rebellious in their counsel, and were brought low in their iniquity.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Nevertheless he regarded their distress, when he heard their cry.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He remembered for them his covenant, and repented according to the multitude of his loving kindnesses.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He made them also to be pitied by all those who carried them captive.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Save us, Yahweh, our God, gather us from among the nations, to give thanks to your holy name, to triumph in your praise!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Blessed be Yahweh, the God of Israel, from everlasting even to everlasting! Let all the people say, “Amen.” Praise Yah!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Give thanks to Yahweh,  for he is good, for his loving kindness endures forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let the redeemed by Yahweh say so, whom he has redeemed from the hand of the adversary,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: And gathered out of the lands, from the east and from the west, from the north and from the south.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They wandered in the wilderness in a desert way. They found no city to live in.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Hungry and thirsty, their soul fainted in them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then they cried to Yahweh in their trouble, and he delivered them out of their distresses,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: he led them also by a straight way, that they might go to a city to live in.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let them praise Yahweh for his loving kindness, for his wonderful deeds to the children of men!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For he satisfies the longing soul. He fills the hungry soul with good.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Some sat in darkness and in the shadow of death, being bound in affliction and iron,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: because they rebelled against the words of God,  and condemned the counsel of the Most High.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore he brought down their heart with labor. They fell down, and there was no one to help.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then they cried to Yahweh in their trouble, and he saved them out of their distresses.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He brought them out of darkness and the shadow of death, and broke away their chains.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let them praise Yahweh for his loving kindness, for his wonderful deeds to the children of men!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For he has broken the gates of brass, and cut through bars of iron.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Fools are afflicted because of their disobedience, and because of their iniquities.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Their soul abhors all kinds of food. They draw near to the gates of death.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then they cry to Yahweh in their trouble, he saves them out of their distresses.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He sends his word, and heals them, and delivers them from their graves.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let them praise Yahweh for his loving kindness, for his wonderful deeds to the children of men!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let them offer the sacrifices of thanksgiving, and declare his deeds with singing.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Those who go down to the sea in ships, who do business in great waters;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: These see Yahweh’s deeds, and his wonders in the deep.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For he commands, and raises the stormy wind, which lifts up its waves.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They mount up to the sky; they go down again to the depths. Their soul melts away because of trouble.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They reel back and forth, and stagger like a drunken man, and are at their wits’ end.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then they cry to Yahweh in their trouble, and he brings them out of their distress.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He makes the storm a calm, so that its waves are still.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then they are glad because it is calm, so he brings them to their desired haven.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let them praise Yahweh for his loving kindness, for his wonderful deeds for the children of men!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let them exalt him also in the assembly of the people, and praise him in the seat of the elders.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He turns rivers into a desert, water springs into a thirsty ground,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and a fruitful land into a salt waste, for the wickedness of those who dwell in it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He turns a desert into a pool of water, and a dry land into water springs.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: There he makes the hungry live, that they may prepare a city to live in,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: sow fields, plant vineyards, and reap the fruits of increase.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He blesses them also, so that they are multiplied greatly. He doesn’t allow their livestock to decrease.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Again, they are diminished and bowed down through oppression, trouble, and sorrow.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He pours contempt on princes, and causes them to wander in a trackless waste.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yet he lifts the needy out of their affliction, and increases their families like a flock.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The upright will see it, and be glad. All the wicked will shut their mouths.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Whoever is wise will pay attention to these things. They will consider the loving kindnesses of Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Song. A Psalm by David. My heart is steadfast, God. I will sing and I will make music with my soul.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Wake up, harp and lyre! I will wake up the dawn.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will give thanks to you, Yahweh, among the nations. I will sing praises to you among the peoples.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For your loving kindness is great above the heavens. Your faithfulness reaches to the skies.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Be exalted, God, above the heavens! Let your glory be over all the earth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: That your beloved may be delivered, save with your right hand, and answer us.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: God has spoken from his sanctuary: “In triumph, I will divide Shechem, and measure out the valley of Succoth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Gilead is mine. Manasseh is mine. Ephraim also is my helmet. Judah is my scepter.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Moab is my wash pot. I will toss my sandal on Edom. I will shout over Philistia.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Who will bring me into the fortified city? Who has led me to Edom?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Haven’t you rejected us, God? You don’t go out, God, with our armies.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Give us help against the enemy, for the help of man is vain.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Through God, we will do valiantly. For it is he who will tread down our enemies.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Chief Musician. A Psalm by David. God of my praise, don’t remain silent,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: for they have opened the mouth of the wicked and the mouth of deceit against me. They have spoken to me with a lying tongue.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They have also surrounded me with words of hatred, and fought against me without a cause.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In return for my love, they are my adversaries; but I am in prayer.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They have rewarded me evil for good, and hatred for my love.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Set a wicked man over him. Let an adversary stand at his right hand.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When he is judged, let him come out guilty. Let his prayer be turned into sin.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let his days be few. Let another take his office.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let his children be fatherless, and his wife a widow.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let his children be wandering beggars. Let them be sought from their ruins.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let the creditor seize all that he has. Let strangers plunder the fruit of his labor.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let there be no one to extend kindness to him, neither let there be anyone to have pity on his fatherless children.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let his posterity be cut off. In the generation following let their name be blotted out.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let the iniquity of his fathers be remembered by Yahweh. Don’t let the sin of his mother be blotted out.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let them be before Yahweh continually, that he may cut off their memory from the earth;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: because he didn’t remember to show kindness, but persecuted the poor and needy man, the broken in heart, to kill them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yes, he loved cursing, and it came to him. He didn’t delight in blessing, and it was far from him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He clothed himself also with cursing as with his garment. It came into his inward parts like water, like oil into his bones.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let it be to him as the clothing with which he covers himself, for the belt that is always around him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: This is the reward of my adversaries from Yahweh, of those who speak evil against my soul.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But deal with me, Yahweh the Lord,  for your name’s sake, because your loving kindness is good, deliver me;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: for I am poor and needy. My heart is wounded within me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I fade away like an evening shadow. I am shaken off like a locust.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My knees are weak through fasting. My body is thin and lacks fat.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have also become a reproach to them. When they see me, they shake their head.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Help me, Yahweh, my God. Save me according to your loving kindness;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: that they may know that this is your hand; that you, Yahweh, have done it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They may curse, but you bless. When they arise, they will be shamed, but your servant shall rejoice.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let my adversaries be clothed with dishonor. Let them cover themselves with their own shame as with a robe.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will give great thanks to Yahweh with my mouth. Yes, I will praise him among the multitude.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For he will stand at the right hand of the needy, to save him from those who judge his soul.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Psalm by David. Yahweh says to my Lord, “Sit at my right hand, until I make your enemies your footstool for your feet.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh will send out the rod of your strength out of Zion. Rule among your enemies.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Your people offer themselves willingly in the day of your power, in holy array. Out of the womb of the morning, you have the dew of your youth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh has sworn, and will not change his mind: “You are a priest forever in the order of Melchizedek.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The Lord is at your right hand. He will crush kings in the day of his wrath.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He will judge among the nations. He will heap up dead bodies. He will crush the ruler of the whole earth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He will drink of the brook on the way; therefore he will lift up his head.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise Yah!  I will give thanks to Yahweh with my whole heart, in the council of the upright, and in the congregation.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh’s works are great, pondered by all those who delight in them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: His work is honor and majesty. His righteousness endures forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has caused his wonderful works to be remembered. Yahweh is gracious and merciful.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has given food to those who fear him. He always remembers his covenant.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has shown his people the power of his works, in giving them the heritage of the nations.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The works of his hands are truth and justice. All his precepts are sure.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They are established forever and ever. They are done in truth and uprightness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has sent redemption to his people. He has ordained his covenant forever. His name is holy and awesome!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The fear of Yahweh is the beginning of wisdom. All those who do his work have a good understanding. His praise endures forever!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise Yah!  Blessed is the man who fears Yahweh, who delights greatly in his commandments.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: His offspring  will be mighty in the land. The generation of the upright will be blessed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Wealth and riches are in his house. His righteousness endures forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Light dawns in the darkness for the upright, gracious, merciful, and righteous.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It is well with the man who deals graciously and lends. He will maintain his cause in judgment.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For he will never be shaken. The righteous will be remembered forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He will not be afraid of evil news. His heart is steadfast, trusting in Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: His heart is established. He will not be afraid in the end when he sees his adversaries.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has dispersed, he has given to the poor. His righteousness endures forever. His horn will be exalted with honor.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The wicked will see it, and be grieved. He shall gnash with his teeth, and melt away. The desire of the wicked will perish.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise Yah! Praise, you servants of Yahweh, praise Yahweh’s name.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Blessed be Yahweh’s name, from this time forward and forever more.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: From the rising of the sun to the going down of the same, Yahweh’s name is to be praised.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh is high above all nations, his glory above the heavens.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Who is like Yahweh, our God, who has his seat on high,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Who stoops down to see in heaven and in the earth?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He raises up the poor out of the dust. Lifts up the needy from the ash heap;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: that he may set him with princes, even with the princes of his people.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He settles the barren woman in her home, as a joyful mother of children. Praise Yah!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When Israel went out of Egypt, the house of Jacob from a people of foreign language;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Judah became his sanctuary, Israel his dominion.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The sea saw it, and fled. The Jordan was driven back.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The mountains skipped like rams, the little hills like lambs.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: What was it, you sea, that you fled? You Jordan, that you turned back?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You mountains, that you skipped like rams; you little hills, like lambs?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Tremble, you earth, at the presence of the Lord, at the presence of the God of Jacob,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who turned the rock into a pool of water, the flint into a spring of waters.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Not to us, Yahweh, not to us, but to your name give glory, for your loving kindness, and for your truth’s sake.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Why should the nations say, “Where is their God, now?”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But our God is in the heavens. He does whatever he pleases.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Their idols are silver and gold, the work of men’s hands.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They have mouths, but they don’t speak. They have eyes, but they don’t see.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They have ears, but they don’t hear. They have noses, but they don’t smell.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They have hands, but they don’t feel. They have feet, but they don’t walk, neither do they speak through their throat.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Those who make them will be like them; yes, everyone who trusts in them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Israel, trust in Yahweh! He is their help and their shield.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: House of Aaron, trust in Yahweh! He is their help and their shield.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You who fear Yahweh, trust in Yahweh! He is their help and their shield.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh remembers us. He will bless us. He will bless the house of Israel. He will bless the house of Aaron.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He will bless those who fear Yahweh, both small and great.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: May Yahweh increase you more and more, you and your children.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Blessed are you by Yahweh, who made heaven and earth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The heavens are the heavens of Yahweh; but the earth has he given to the children of men.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The dead don’t praise Yah, neither any who go down into silence;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But we will bless Yah, from this time forward and forever more. Praise Yah!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I love Yahweh, because he listens to my voice, and my cries for mercy.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Because he has turned his ear to me, therefore I will call on him as long as I live.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The cords of death surrounded me, the pains of Sheol  got a hold of me. I found trouble and sorrow.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then I called on Yahweh’s name: “Yahweh, I beg you, deliver my soul.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh is Gracious and righteous. Yes, our God is merciful.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh preserves the simple. I was brought low, and he saved me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Return to your rest, my soul, for Yahweh has dealt bountifully with you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For you have delivered my soul from death, my eyes from tears, and my feet from falling.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will walk before Yahweh in the land of the living.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I believed, therefore I said, “I was greatly afflicted.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I said in my haste, “All men are liars.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: What will I give to Yahweh for all his benefits toward me?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will take the cup of salvation, and call on Yahweh’s name.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will pay my vows to Yahweh, yes, in the presence of all his people.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Precious in Yahweh’s sight is the death of his saints.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh, truly I am your servant. I am your servant, the son of your servant. You have freed me from my chains.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will offer to you the sacrifice of thanksgiving, and will call on Yahweh’s name.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will pay my vows to Yahweh, yes, in the presence of all his people,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: in the courts of Yahweh’s house, in the middle of you, Jerusalem. Praise Yah!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise Yahweh, all you nations! Extol him, all you peoples!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For his loving kindness is great toward us. Yahweh’s faithfulness endures forever. Praise Yah!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Give thanks to Yahweh, for he is good, for his loving kindness endures forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let Israel now say that his loving kindness endures forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let the house of Aaron now say that his loving kindness endures forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Now let those who fear Yahweh say that his loving kindness endures forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Out of my distress, I called on Yah. Yah answered me with freedom.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh is on my side. I will not be afraid. What can man do to me?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh is on my side among those who help me. Therefore I will look in triumph at those who hate me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It is better to take refuge in Yahweh, than to put confidence in man.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It is better to take refuge in Yahweh, than to put confidence in princes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All the nations surrounded me, but in Yahweh’s name, I cut them off.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They surrounded me, yes, they surrounded me. In Yahweh’s name I indeed cut them off.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They surrounded me like bees. They are quenched like the burning thorns. In Yahweh’s name I cut them off.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You pushed me back hard, to make me fall, but Yahweh helped me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yah is my strength and song. He has become my salvation.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The voice of rejoicing and salvation is in the tents of the righteous. “The right hand of Yahweh does valiantly.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The right hand of Yahweh is exalted! The right hand of Yahweh does valiantly!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will not die, but live, and declare Yah’s works.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yah has punished me severely, but he has not given me over to death.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Open to me the gates of righteousness. I will enter into them. I will give thanks to Yah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: This is the gate of Yahweh; the righteous will enter into it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will give thanks to you, for you have answered me, and have become my salvation.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The stone which the builders rejected has become the cornerstone.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: This is Yahweh’s doing. It is marvelous in our eyes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: This is the day that Yahweh has made. We will rejoice and be glad in it!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Save us now, we beg you, Yahweh! Yahweh, we beg you, send prosperity now.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Blessed is he who comes in Yahweh’s name! We have blessed you out of Yahweh’s house.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh is God, and he has given us light. Bind the sacrifice with cords, even to the horns of the altar.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You are my God, and I will give thanks to you. You are my God, I will exalt you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Oh give thanks to Yahweh, for he is good, for his loving kindness endures forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: ALEPH Blessed are those whose ways are blameless, who walk according to Yahweh’s law.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Blessed are those who keep his statutes, who seek him with their whole heart.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yes, they do nothing wrong. They walk in his ways.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have commanded your precepts, that we should fully obey them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Oh that my ways were steadfast to obey your statutes!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then I wouldn’t be disappointed, when I consider all of your commandments.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will give thanks to you with uprightness of heart, when I learn your righteous judgments.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will observe your statutes. Don’t utterly forsake me. BET

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: How can a young man keep his way pure? By living according to your word.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: With my whole heart, I have sought you. Don’t let me wander from your commandments.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have hidden your word in my heart, that I might not sin against you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Blessed are you, Yahweh. Teach me your statutes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: With my lips, I have declared all the ordinances of your mouth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have rejoiced in the way of your testimonies, as much as in all riches.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will meditate on your precepts, and consider your ways.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will delight myself in your statutes. I will not forget your word. GIMEL

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Do good to your servant. I will live and I will obey your word.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Open my eyes, that I may see wondrous things out of your law.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I am a stranger on the earth. Don’t hide your commandments from me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My soul is consumed with longing for your ordinances at all times.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have rebuked the proud who are cursed, who wander from your commandments.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Take reproach and contempt away from me, for I have kept your statutes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Though princes sit and slander me, your servant will meditate on your statutes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Indeed your statutes are my delight, and my counselors. DALED

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My soul is laid low in the dust. Revive me according to your word!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I declared my ways, and you answered me. Teach me your statutes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let me understand the teaching of your precepts! Then I will meditate on your wondrous works.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My soul is weary with sorrow: strengthen me according to your word.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Keep me from the way of deceit. Grant me your law graciously!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have chosen the way of truth. I have set your ordinances before me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I cling to your statutes, Yahweh. Don’t let me be disappointed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I run in the path of your commandments, for you have set my heart free. HEY

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Teach me, Yahweh, the way of your statutes. I will keep them to the end.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Give me understanding, and I will keep your law. Yes, I will obey it with my whole heart.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Direct me in the path of your commandments, for I delight in them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Turn my heart toward your statutes, not toward selfish gain.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Turn my eyes away from looking at worthless things. Revive me in your ways.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Fulfill your promise to your servant, that you may be feared.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Take away my disgrace that I dread, for your ordinances are good.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Behold, I long for your precepts! Revive me in your righteousness. WAW

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let your loving kindness also come to me, Yahweh, your salvation, according to your word.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: So I will have an answer for him who reproaches me, for I trust in your word.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Don’t snatch the word of truth out of my mouth, for I put my hope in your ordinances.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: So I will obey your law continually, forever and ever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will walk in liberty, for I have sought your precepts.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will also speak of your statutes before kings, and will not be disappointed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will delight myself in your commandments, because I love them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I reach out my hands for your commandments, which I love. I will meditate on your statutes. ZAYIN

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Remember your word to your servant, because you gave me hope.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: This is my comfort in my affliction, for your word has revived me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The arrogant mock me excessively, but I don’t swerve from your law.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I remember your ordinances of old, Yahweh, and have comforted myself.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Indignation has taken hold on me, because of the wicked who forsake your law.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Your statutes have been my songs, in the house where I live.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have remembered your name, Yahweh, in the night, and I obey your law.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: This is my way, that I keep your precepts. CHET

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh is my portion. I promised to obey your words.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I sought your favor with my whole heart. Be merciful to me according to your word.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I considered my ways, and turned my steps to your statutes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will hurry, and not delay, to obey your commandments.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The ropes of the wicked bind me, but I won’t forget your law.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: At midnight I will rise to give thanks to you, because of your righteous ordinances.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I am a friend of all those who fear you, of those who observe your precepts.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The earth is full of your loving kindness, Yahweh. Teach me your statutes. TET

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Do good to your servant, according to your word, Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Teach me good judgment and knowledge, for I believe in your commandments.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Before I was afflicted, I went astray; but now I observe your word.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You are good, and do good. Teach me your statutes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The proud have smeared a lie upon me. With my whole heart, I will keep your precepts.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Their heart is as callous as the fat, but I delight in your law.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It is good for me that I have been afflicted, that I may learn your statutes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The law of your mouth is better to me than thousands of pieces of gold and silver. YUD

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Your hands have made me and formed me. Give me understanding, that I may learn your commandments.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Those who fear you will see me and be glad, because I have put my hope in your word.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh, I know that your judgments are righteous, that in faithfulness you have afflicted me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Please let your loving kindness be for my comfort, according to your word to your servant.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let your tender mercies come to me, that I may live; for your law is my delight.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let the proud be disappointed, for they have overthrown me wrongfully. I will meditate on your precepts.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let those who fear you turn to me. They will know your statutes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let my heart be blameless toward your decrees, that I may not be disappointed. KAF

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My soul faints for your salvation. I hope in your word.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My eyes fail for your word. I say, “When will you comfort me?”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For I have become like a wineskin in the smoke. I don’t forget your statutes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: How many are the days of your servant? When will you execute judgment on those who persecute me?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The proud have dug pits for me, contrary to your law.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All of your commandments are faithful. They persecute me wrongfully. Help me!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They had almost wiped me from the earth, but I didn’t forsake your precepts.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Preserve my life according to your loving kindness, so I will obey the statutes of your mouth. LAMED

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh, your word is settled in heaven forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Your faithfulness is to all generations. You have established the earth, and it remains.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Your laws remain to this day, for all things serve you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Unless your law had been my delight, I would have perished in my affliction.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will never forget your precepts, for with them, you have revived me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I am yours. Save me, for I have sought your precepts.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The wicked have waited for me, to destroy me. I will consider your statutes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have seen a limit to all perfection, but your commands are boundless. MEM

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: How I love your law! It is my meditation all day.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Your commandments make me wiser than my enemies, for your commandments are always with me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have more understanding than all my teachers, for your testimonies are my meditation.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I understand more than the aged, because I have kept your precepts.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have kept my feet from every evil way, that I might observe your word.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have not turned aside from your ordinances, for you have taught me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: How sweet are your promises to my taste, more than honey to my mouth!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Through your precepts, I get understanding; therefore I hate every false way. NUN

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Your word is a lamp to my feet, and a light for my path.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have sworn, and have confirmed it, that I will obey your righteous ordinances.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I am afflicted very much. Revive me, Yahweh, according to your word.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Accept, I beg you, the willing offerings of my mouth. Yahweh, teach me your ordinances.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My soul is continually in my hand, yet I won’t forget your law.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The wicked have laid a snare for me, yet I haven’t gone astray from your precepts.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have taken your testimonies as a heritage forever, for they are the joy of my heart.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have set my heart to perform your statutes forever, even to the end. SAMEKH

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I hate double-minded men, but I love your law.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You are my hiding place and my shield. I hope in your word.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Depart from me, you evildoers, that I may keep the commandments of my God.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Uphold me according to your word, that I may live. Let me not be ashamed of my hope.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Hold me up, and I will be safe, and will have respect for your statutes continually.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You reject all those who stray from your statutes, for their deceit is in vain.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You put away all the wicked of the earth like dross. Therefore I love your testimonies.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My flesh trembles for fear of you. I am afraid of your judgments. AYIN

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have done what is just and righteous. Don’t leave me to my oppressors.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Ensure your servant’s well-being. Don’t let the proud oppress me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My eyes fail looking for your salvation, for your righteous word.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Deal with your servant according to your loving kindness. Teach me your statutes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I am your servant. Give me understanding, that I may know your testimonies.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It is time to act, Yahweh, for they break your law.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore I love your commandments more than gold, yes, more than pure gold.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore I consider all of your precepts to be right. I hate every false way. PEY

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Your testimonies are wonderful, therefore my soul keeps them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The entrance of your words gives light. It gives understanding to the simple.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I opened my mouth wide and panted, for I longed for your commandments.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Turn to me, and have mercy on me, as you always do to those who love your name.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Establish my footsteps in your word. Don’t let any iniquity have dominion over me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Redeem me from the oppression of man, so I will observe your precepts.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Make your face shine on your servant. Teach me your statutes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Streams of tears run down my eyes, because they don’t observe your law. TZADI

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You are righteous, Yahweh. Your judgments are upright.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You have commanded your statutes in righteousness. They are fully trustworthy.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My zeal wears me out, because my enemies ignore your words.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Your promises have been thoroughly tested, and your servant loves them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I am small and despised. I don’t forget your precepts.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Your righteousness is an everlasting righteousness. Your law is truth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Trouble and anguish have taken hold of me. Your commandments are my delight.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Your testimonies are righteous forever. Give me understanding, that I may live. KUF

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have called with my whole heart. Answer me, Yahweh! I will keep your statutes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have called to you. Save me! I will obey your statutes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I rise before dawn and cry for help. I put my hope in your words.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My eyes stay open through the night watches, that I might meditate on your word.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Hear my voice according to your loving kindness. Revive me, Yahweh, according to your ordinances.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They draw near who follow after wickedness. They are far from your law.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You are near, Yahweh. All your commandments are truth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Of old I have known from your testimonies, that you have founded them forever. RESH

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Consider my affliction, and deliver me, for I don’t forget your law.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Plead my cause, and redeem me! Revive me according to your promise.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Salvation is far from the wicked, for they don’t seek your statutes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Great are your tender mercies, Yahweh. Revive me according to your ordinances.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Many are my persecutors and my adversaries. I haven’t swerved from your testimonies.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I look at the faithless with loathing, because they don’t observe your word.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Consider how I love your precepts. Revive me, Yahweh, according to your loving kindness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All of your words are truth. Every one of your righteous ordinances endures forever. SIN AND SHIN

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Princes have persecuted me without a cause, but my heart stands in awe of your words.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I rejoice at your word, as one who finds great plunder.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I hate and abhor falsehood. I love your law.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Seven times a day, I praise you, because of your righteous ordinances.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Those who love your law have great peace. Nothing causes them to stumble.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have hoped for your salvation, Yahweh. I have done your commandments.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My soul has observed your testimonies. I love them exceedingly.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have obeyed your precepts and your testimonies, for all my ways are before you. TAV

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let my cry come before you, Yahweh. Give me understanding according to your word.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let my supplication come before you. Deliver me according to your word.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let my lips utter praise, for you teach me your statutes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let my tongue sing of your word, for all your commandments are righteousness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let your hand be ready to help me, for I have chosen your precepts.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have longed for your salvation, Yahweh. Your law is my delight.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let my soul live, that I may praise you. Let your ordinances help me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I have gone astray like a lost sheep. Seek your servant, for I don’t forget your commandments.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Song of Ascents. In my distress, I cried to Yahweh. He answered me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Deliver my soul, Yahweh, from lying lips, from a deceitful tongue.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: What will be given to you, and what will be done more to you, you deceitful tongue?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Sharp arrows of the mighty, with coals of juniper.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Woe is me, that I live in Meshech, that I dwell among the tents of Kedar!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My soul has had her dwelling too long with him who hates peace.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I am for peace, but when I speak, they are for war.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Song of Ascents. I will lift up my eyes to the hills. Where does my help come from?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My help comes from Yahweh, who made heaven and earth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He will not allow your foot to be moved. He who keeps you will not slumber.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Behold, he who keeps Israel will neither slumber nor sleep.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh is your keeper. Yahweh is your shade on your right hand.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The sun will not harm you by day, nor the moon by night.

translations.name: World English Bible
