translations.text: Yahweh will keep you from all evil. He will keep your soul.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh will keep your going out and your coming in, from this time forward, and forever more.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Song of Ascents. By David. I was glad when they said to me, “Let’s go to Yahweh’s house!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Our feet are standing within your gates, Jerusalem;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Jerusalem, that is built as a city that is compact together;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: where the tribes go up, even Yah’s tribes, according to an ordinance for Israel, to give thanks to Yahweh’s name.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For there are set thrones for judgment, the thrones of David’s house.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Pray for the peace of Jerusalem. Those who love you will prosper.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Peace be within your walls, and prosperity within your palaces.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For my brothers’ and companions’ sakes, I will now say, “Peace be within you.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the sake of the house of Yahweh our God, I will seek your good.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Song of Ascents. To you I do lift up my eyes, you who sit in the heavens.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Behold, as the eyes of servants look to the hand of their master, as the eyes of a maid to the hand of her mistress; so our eyes look to Yahweh, our God, until he has mercy on us.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Have mercy on us, Yahweh, have mercy on us, for we have endured much contempt.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Our soul is exceedingly filled with the scoffing of those who are at ease, with the contempt of the proud.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Song of Ascents. By David. If it had not been Yahweh who was on our side, let Israel now say,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: if it had not been Yahweh who was on our side, when men rose up against us;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: then they would have swallowed us up alive, when their wrath was kindled against us;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: then the waters would have overwhelmed us, the stream would have gone over our soul;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: then the proud waters would have gone over our soul.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Blessed be Yahweh, who has not given us as a prey to their teeth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Our soul has escaped like a bird out of the fowler’s snare. The snare is broken, and we have escaped.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Our help is in Yahweh’s name, who made heaven and earth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Song of Ascents. Those who trust in Yahweh are as Mount Zion, which can’t be moved, but remains forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: As the mountains surround Jerusalem, so Yahweh surrounds his people from this time forward and forever more.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the scepter of wickedness won’t remain over the allotment of the righteous; so that the righteous won’t use their hands to do evil.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Do good, Yahweh, to those who are good, to those who are upright in their hearts.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But as for those who turn aside to their crooked ways, Yahweh will lead them away with the workers of iniquity. Peace be on Israel.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Song of Ascents. When Yahweh brought back those who returned to Zion, we were like those who dream.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then our mouth was filled with laughter, and our tongue with singing. Then they said among the nations, “Yahweh has done great things for them.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh has done great things for us, and we are glad.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Restore our fortunes again, Yahweh, like the streams in the Negev.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Those who sow in tears will reap in joy.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He who goes out weeping, carrying seed for sowing, will certainly come again with joy, carrying his sheaves.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Song of Ascents. By Solomon. Unless Yahweh builds the house, they labor in vain who build it. Unless Yahweh watches over the city, the watchman guards it in vain.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It is vain for you to rise up early, to stay up late, eating the bread of toil; for he gives sleep to his loved ones.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Behold, children are a heritage of Yahweh. The fruit of the womb is his reward.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: As arrows in the hand of a mighty man, so are the children of youth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Happy is the man who has his quiver full of them. They won’t be disappointed when they speak with their enemies in the gate.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Song of Ascents. Blessed is everyone who fears Yahweh, who walks in his ways.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For you will eat the labor of your hands. You will be happy, and it will be well with you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Your wife will be as a fruitful vine, in the innermost parts of your house; your children like olive plants, around your table.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Behold, thus is the man blessed who fears Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: May Yahweh bless you out of Zion, and may you see the good of Jerusalem all the days of your life.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yes, may you see your children’s children. Peace be upon Israel.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Song of Ascents. Many times they have afflicted me from my youth up. Let Israel now say,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: many times they have afflicted me from my youth up, yet they have not prevailed against me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The plowers plowed on my back. They made their furrows long.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh is righteous. He has cut apart the cords of the wicked.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let them be disappointed and turned backward, all those who hate Zion.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let them be as the grass on the housetops, which withers before it grows up;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: with which the reaper doesn’t fill his hand, nor he who binds sheaves, his bosom.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Neither do those who go by say, “The blessing of Yahweh be on you. We bless you in Yahweh’s name.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Song of Ascents. Out of the depths I have cried to you, Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Lord, hear my voice. Let your ears be attentive to the voice of my petitions.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: If you, Yah, kept a record of sins, Lord, who could stand?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But there is forgiveness with you, therefore you are feared.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I wait for Yahweh. My soul waits. I hope in his word.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My soul longs for the Lord more than watchmen long for the morning; more than watchmen for the morning.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Israel, hope in Yahweh, for with Yahweh there is loving kindness. With him is abundant redemption.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He will redeem Israel from all their sins.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Song of Ascents. By David. Yahweh, my heart isn’t haughty, nor my eyes lofty; nor do I concern myself with great matters, or things too wonderful for me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Surely I have stilled and quieted my soul, like a weaned child with his mother, like a weaned child is my soul within me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Israel, hope in Yahweh, from this time forward and forever more.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Song of Ascents. Yahweh, remember David and all his affliction,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: how he swore to Yahweh, and vowed to the Mighty One of Jacob:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “Surely I will not come into the structure of my house, nor go up into my bed;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will not give sleep to my eyes, or slumber to my eyelids;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: until I find out a place for Yahweh, a dwelling for the Mighty One of Jacob.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Behold, we heard of it in Ephrathah. We found it in the field of Jaar:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “We will go into his dwelling place. We will worship at his footstool.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Arise, Yahweh, into your resting place; you, and the ark of your strength.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let your priests be clothed with righteousness. Let your saints shout for joy!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For your servant David’s sake, don’t turn away the face of your anointed one.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh has sworn to David in truth. He will not turn from it: “I will set the fruit of your body on your throne.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: If your children will keep my covenant, my testimony that I will teach them, their children also will sit on your throne forever more.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For Yahweh has chosen Zion. He has desired it for his habitation.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “This is my resting place forever. Here I will live, for I have desired it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will abundantly bless her provision. I will satisfy her poor with bread.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Her priests I will also clothe with salvation. Her saints will shout aloud for joy.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: There I will make the horn of David to bud. I have ordained a lamp for my anointed.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will clothe his enemies with shame, but on himself, his crown will be resplendent.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Song of Ascents. By David. See how good and how pleasant it is for brothers to live together in unity!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: It is like the precious oil on the head, that ran down on the beard, even Aaron’s beard; that came down on the edge of his robes;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: like the dew of Hermon, that comes down on the hills of Zion: for there Yahweh gives the blessing, even life forever more.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Song of Ascents. Look! Praise Yahweh, all you servants of Yahweh, who stand by night in Yahweh’s house!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Lift up your hands in the sanctuary. Praise Yahweh!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: May Yahweh bless you from Zion; even he who made heaven and earth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise Yah! Praise Yahweh’s name! Praise him, you servants of Yahweh,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: you who stand in Yahweh’s house, in the courts of our God’s house.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise Yah, for Yahweh is good. Sing praises to his name, for that is pleasant.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For Yah has chosen Jacob for himself; Israel for his own possession.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For I know that Yahweh is great, that our Lord is above all gods.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Whatever Yahweh pleased, that he has done, in heaven and in earth, in the seas and in all deeps;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who causes the clouds to rise from the ends of the earth; who makes lightnings with the rain; who brings the wind out of his treasuries;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Who struck the firstborn of Egypt, both of man and animal;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Who sent signs and wonders into the middle of you, Egypt, on Pharaoh, and on all his servants;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who struck many nations, and killed mighty kings,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Sihon king of the Amorites, Og king of Bashan, and all the kingdoms of Canaan,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: and gave their land for a heritage, a heritage to Israel, his people.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Your name, Yahweh, endures forever; your renown, Yahweh, throughout all generations.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For Yahweh will judge his people, and have compassion on his servants.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The idols of the nations are silver and gold, the work of men’s hands.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They have mouths, but they can’t speak. They have eyes, but they can’t see.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They have ears, but they can’t hear; neither is there any breath in their mouths.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Those who make them will be like them; yes, everyone who trusts in them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: House of Israel, praise Yahweh! House of Aaron, praise Yahweh!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: House of Levi, praise Yahweh! You who fear Yahweh, praise Yahweh!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Blessed be Yahweh from Zion, Who dwells at Jerusalem. Praise Yah!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Give thanks to Yahweh, for he is good; for his loving kindness endures forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Give thanks to the God of gods; for his loving kindness endures forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Give thanks to the Lord of lords; for his loving kindness endures forever:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: To him who alone does great wonders; for his loving kindness endures forever:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: To him who by understanding made the heavens; for his loving kindness endures forever:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: To him who spread out the earth above the waters; for his loving kindness endures forever:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: To him who made the great lights; for his loving kindness endures forever:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The sun to rule by day; for his loving kindness endures forever;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The moon and stars to rule by night; for his loving kindness endures forever:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: To him who struck down the Egyptian firstborn; for his loving kindness endures forever;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: And brought out Israel from among them; for his loving kindness endures forever;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: With a strong hand, and with an outstretched arm; for his loving kindness endures forever:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: To him who divided the Red Sea apart; for his loving kindness endures forever;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: And made Israel to pass through the middle of it; for his loving kindness endures forever;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But overthrew Pharaoh and his army in the Red Sea; for his loving kindness endures forever:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: To him who led his people through the wilderness; for his loving kindness endures forever:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: To him who struck great kings; for his loving kindness endures forever;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: And killed mighty kings; for his loving kindness endures forever:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Sihon king of the Amorites; for his loving kindness endures forever;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Og king of Bashan; for his loving kindness endures forever;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: And gave their land as an inheritance; for his loving kindness endures forever;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Even a heritage to Israel his servant; for his loving kindness endures forever:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Who remembered us in our low estate; for his loving kindness endures forever;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: And has delivered us from our adversaries; for his loving kindness endures forever:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Who gives food to every creature; for his loving kindness endures forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Oh give thanks to the God of heaven; for his loving kindness endures forever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By the rivers of Babylon, there we sat down. Yes, we wept, when we remembered Zion.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: On the willows in that land, we hung up our harps.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For there, those who led us captive asked us for songs. Those who tormented us demanded songs of joy: “Sing us one of the songs of Zion!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: How can we sing Yahweh’s song in a foreign land?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: If I forget you, Jerusalem, let my right hand forget its skill.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let my tongue stick to the roof of my mouth if I don’t remember you; if I don’t prefer Jerusalem above my chief joy.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Remember, Yahweh, against the children of Edom, the day of Jerusalem; who said, “Raze it! Raze it even to its foundation!”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Daughter of Babylon, doomed to destruction, he will be happy who rewards you, as you have served us.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Happy shall he be, who takes and dashes your little ones against the rock.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By David. I will give you thanks with my whole heart. Before the gods, I will sing praises to you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will bow down toward your holy temple, and give thanks to your Name for your loving kindness and for your truth; for you have exalted your Name and your Word above all.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In the day that I called, you answered me. You encouraged me with strength in my soul.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All the kings of the earth will give you thanks, Yahweh, for they have heard the words of your mouth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yes, they will sing of the ways of Yahweh; for great is Yahweh’s glory.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For though Yahweh is high, yet he looks after the lowly; but the proud, he knows from afar.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Though I walk in the middle of trouble, you will revive me. You will stretch out your hand against the wrath of my enemies. Your right hand will save me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh will fulfill that which concerns me; your loving kindness, Yahweh, endures forever. Don’t forsake the works of your own hands.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Chief Musician. A Psalm by David. Yahweh, you have searched me, and you know me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You know my sitting down and my rising up. You perceive my thoughts from afar.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You search out my path and my lying down, and are acquainted with all my ways.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For there is not a word on my tongue, but, behold, Yahweh, you know it altogether.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You hem me in behind and before. You laid your hand on me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: This knowledge is beyond me. It’s lofty. I can’t attain it.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Where could I go from your Spirit? Or where could I flee from your presence?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: If I ascend up into heaven, you are there. If I make my bed in Sheol,  behold, you are there!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: If I take the wings of the dawn, and settle in the uttermost parts of the sea;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Even there your hand will lead me, and your right hand will hold me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: If I say, “Surely the darkness will overwhelm me; the light around me will be night”;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: even the darkness doesn’t hide from you, but the night shines as the day. The darkness is like light to you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For you formed my inmost being. You knit me together in my mother’s womb.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will give thanks to you, for I am fearfully and wonderfully made. Your works are wonderful. My soul knows that very well.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My frame wasn’t hidden from you, when I was made in secret, woven together in the depths of the earth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Your eyes saw my body. In your book they were all written, the days that were ordained for me, when as yet there were none of them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: How precious to me are your thoughts, God! How vast is their sum!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: If I would count them, they are more in number than the sand. When I wake up, I am still with you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: If only you, God, would kill the wicked. Get away from me, you bloodthirsty men!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For they speak against you wickedly. Your enemies take your name in vain.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh, don’t I hate those who hate you? Am I not grieved with those who rise up against you?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I hate them with perfect hatred. They have become my enemies.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Search me, God, and know my heart. Try me, and know my thoughts.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: See if there is any wicked way in me, and lead me in the everlasting way.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the Chief Musician. A Psalm by David. Deliver me, Yahweh, from the evil man. Preserve me from the violent man;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: those who devise mischief in their hearts. They continually gather themselves together for war.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They have sharpened their tongues like a serpent. Viper’s poison is under their lips. Selah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh, keep me from the hands of the wicked. Preserve me from the violent men who have determined to trip my feet.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The proud have hidden a snare for me, they have spread the cords of a net by the path. They have set traps for me. Selah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I said to Yahweh, “You are my God.” Listen to the cry of my petitions, Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh, the Lord, the strength of my salvation, you have covered my head in the day of battle.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh, don’t grant the desires of the wicked. Don’t let their evil plans succeed, or they will become proud. Selah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: As for the head of those who surround me, let the mischief of their own lips cover them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let burning coals fall on them. Let them be thrown into the fire, into miry pits, from where they never rise.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: An evil speaker won’t be established in the earth. Evil will hunt the violent man to overthrow him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I know that Yahweh will maintain the cause of the afflicted, and justice for the needy.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Surely the righteous will give thanks to your name. The upright will dwell in your presence.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Psalm by David. Yahweh, I have called on you. Come to me quickly! Listen to my voice when I call to you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let my prayer be set before you like incense; the lifting up of my hands like the evening sacrifice.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Set a watch, Yahweh, before my mouth. Keep the door of my lips.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Don’t incline my heart to any evil thing, to practice deeds of wickedness with men who work iniquity. Don’t let me eat of their delicacies.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let the righteous strike me, it is kindness; let him reprove me, it is like oil on the head; don’t let my head refuse it; Yet my prayer is always against evil deeds.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Their judges are thrown down by the sides of the rock. They will hear my words, for they are well spoken.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: “As when one plows and breaks up the earth, our bones are scattered at the mouth of Sheol.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For my eyes are on you, Yahweh, the Lord. In you, I take refuge. Don’t leave my soul destitute.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Keep me from the snare which they have laid for me, from the traps of the workers of iniquity.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let the wicked fall together into their own nets, while I pass by.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A contemplation by David, when he was in the cave. A Prayer. I cry with my voice to Yahweh. With my voice, I ask Yahweh for mercy.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I pour out my complaint before him. I tell him my troubles.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: When my spirit was overwhelmed within me, you knew my route. On the path in which I walk, they have hidden a snare for me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Look on my right, and see; for there is no one who is concerned for me. Refuge has fled from me. No one cares for my soul.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I cried to you, Yahweh. I said, “You are my refuge, my portion in the land of the living.”

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Listen to my cry, for I am in desperate need. deliver me from my persecutors, For they are stronger than me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Bring my soul out of prison, that I may give thanks to your name. The righteous will surround me, for you will be good to me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A Psalm by David. Hear my prayer, Yahweh. Listen to my petitions. In your faithfulness and righteousness, relieve me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Don’t enter into judgment with your servant, for in your sight no man living is righteous.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For the enemy pursues my soul. He has struck my life down to the ground. He has made me live in dark places, as those who have been long dead.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Therefore my spirit is overwhelmed within me. My heart within me is desolate.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I remember the days of old. I meditate on all your doings. I contemplate the work of your hands.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I spread out my hands to you. My soul thirsts for you, like a parched land. Selah.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Hurry to answer me, Yahweh. My spirit fails. Don’t hide your face from me, so that I don’t become like those who go down into the pit.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Cause me to hear your loving kindness in the morning, for I trust in you. Cause me to know the way in which I should walk, for I lift up my soul to you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Deliver me, Yahweh, from my enemies. I flee to you to hide me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Teach me to do your will, for you are my God. Your Spirit is good. Lead me in the land of uprightness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Revive me, Yahweh, for your name’s sake. In your righteousness, bring my soul out of trouble.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: In your loving kindness, cut off my enemies, and destroy all those who afflict my soul, For I am your servant.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: By David. Blessed be Yahweh, my rock, who teaches my hands to war, and my fingers to battle:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: my loving kindness, my fortress, my high tower, my deliverer, my shield, and he in whom I take refuge; who subdues my people under me.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh, what is man, that you care for him? Or the son of man, that you think of him?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Man is like a breath. His days are like a shadow that passes away.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Part your heavens, Yahweh, and come down. Touch the mountains, and they will smoke.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Throw out lightning, and scatter them. Send out your arrows, and rout them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Stretch out your hand from above, rescue me, and deliver me out of great waters, out of the hands of foreigners;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: whose mouths speak deceit, Whose right hand is a right hand of falsehood.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I will sing a new song to you, God. On a ten-stringed lyre, I will sing praises to you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You are he who gives salvation to kings, who rescues David, his servant, from the deadly sword.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Rescue me, and deliver me out of the hands of foreigners, whose mouths speak deceit, whose right hand is a right hand of falsehood.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Then our sons will be like well-nurtured plants, our daughters like pillars carved to adorn a palace.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Our barns are full, filled with all kinds of provision. Our sheep produce thousands and ten thousands in our fields.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Our oxen will pull heavy loads. There is no breaking in, and no going away, and no outcry in our streets.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Happy are the people who are in such a situation. Happy are the people whose God is Yahweh.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: A praise psalm by David. I will exalt you, my God, the King. I will praise your name forever and ever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Every day I will praise you. I will extol your name forever and ever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Great is Yahweh, and greatly to be praised! His greatness is unsearchable.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: One generation will commend your works to another, and will declare your mighty acts.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Of the glorious majesty of your honor, of your wondrous works, I will meditate.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Men will speak of the might of your awesome acts. I will declare your greatness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They will utter the memory of your great goodness, and will sing of your righteousness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh is gracious, merciful, slow to anger, and of great loving kindness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh is good to all. His tender mercies are over all his works.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: All your works will give thanks to you, Yahweh. Your saints will extol you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: They will speak of the glory of your kingdom, and talk about your power;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: to make known to the sons of men his mighty acts, the glory of the majesty of his kingdom.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom. Your dominion endures throughout all generations. Yahweh is faithful in all his words, and loving in all his deeds.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh upholds all who fall, and raises up all those who are bowed down.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: The eyes of all wait for you. You give them their food in due season.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: You open your hand, and satisfy the desire of every living thing.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh is righteous in all his ways, and gracious in all his works.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh is near to all those who call on him, to all who call on him in truth.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He will fulfill the desire of those who fear him. He also will hear their cry, and will save them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh preserves all those who love him, but all the wicked he will destroy.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My mouth will speak the praise of Yahweh. Let all flesh bless his holy name forever and ever.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise Yah! Praise Yahweh, my soul.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: While I live, I will praise Yahweh. I will sing praises to my God as long as I exist.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Don’t put your trust in princes, each a son of man in whom there is no help.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: His spirit departs, and he returns to the earth. In that very day, his thoughts perish.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Happy is he who has the God of Jacob for his help, whose hope is in Yahweh, his God:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who made heaven and earth, the sea, and all that is in them; who keeps truth forever;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who executes justice for the oppressed; who gives food to the hungry. Yahweh frees the prisoners.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh opens the eyes of the blind. Yahweh raises up those who are bowed down. Yahweh loves the righteous.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh preserves the foreigners. He upholds the fatherless and widow, but the way of the wicked he turns upside down.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh will reign forever; your God, O Zion, to all generations. Praise Yah!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise Yah, for it is good to sing praises to our God; for it is pleasant and fitting to praise him.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh builds up Jerusalem. He gathers together the outcasts of Israel.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He heals the broken in heart, and binds up their wounds.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He counts the number of the stars. He calls them all by their names.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Great is our Lord, and mighty in power. His understanding is infinite.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh upholds the humble. He brings the wicked down to the ground.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Sing to Yahweh with thanksgiving. Sing praises on the harp to our God,

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: who covers the sky with clouds, who prepares rain for the earth, who makes grass grow on the mountains.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He provides food for the livestock, and for the young ravens when they call.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He doesn’t delight in the strength of the horse. He takes no pleasure in the legs of a man.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Yahweh takes pleasure in those who fear him, in those who hope in his loving kindness.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise Yahweh, Jerusalem! Praise your God, Zion!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For he has strengthened the bars of your gates. He has blessed your children within you.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He makes peace in your borders. He fills you with the finest of the wheat.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He sends out his commandment to the earth. His word runs very swiftly.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He gives snow like wool, and scatters frost like ashes.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He hurls down his hail like pebbles. Who can stand before his cold?

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He sends out his word, and melts them. He causes his wind to blow, and the waters flow.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He shows his word to Jacob; his statutes and his ordinances to Israel.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has not done this for just any nation. They don’t know his ordinances. Praise Yah!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise Yah! Praise Yahweh from the heavens! Praise him in the heights!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise him, all his angels! Praise him, all his army!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise him, sun and moon! Praise him, all you shining stars!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise him, you heavens of heavens, You waters that are above the heavens.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let them praise Yahweh’s name, For he commanded, and they were created.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has also established them forever and ever. He has made a decree which will not pass away.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise Yahweh from the earth, you great sea creatures, and all depths;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: lightning and hail, snow and clouds; stormy wind, fulfilling his word;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: mountains and all hills; fruit trees and all cedars;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: wild animals and all livestock; small creatures and flying birds;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: kings of the earth and all peoples; princes and all judges of the earth;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: both young men and maidens; old men and children:

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: let them praise Yahweh’s name, for his name alone is exalted. His glory is above the earth and the heavens.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He has lifted up the horn of his people, the praise of all his saints; even of the children of Israel, a people near to him. Praise Yah!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise Yahweh! Sing to Yahweh a new song, his praise in the assembly of the saints.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let Israel rejoice in him who made them. Let the children of Zion be joyful in their King.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let them praise his name in the dance! Let them sing praises to him with tambourine and harp!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: For Yahweh takes pleasure in his people. He crowns the humble with salvation.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let the saints rejoice in honor. Let them sing for joy on their beds.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: May the high praises of God be in their mouths, and a two-edged sword in their hand;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: To execute vengeance on the nations, and punishments on the peoples;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: To bind their kings with chains, and their nobles with fetters of iron;

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: to execute on them the written judgment. All his saints have this honor. Praise Yah!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise Yah! Praise God in his sanctuary! Praise him in his heavens for his acts of power!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise him for his mighty acts! Praise him according to his excellent greatness!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise him with the sounding of the trumpet! Praise him with harp and lyre!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise him with tambourine and dancing! Praise him with stringed instruments and flute!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Praise him with loud cymbals! Praise him with resounding cymbals!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Let everything that has breath praise Yah! Praise Yah!

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: This Psalm is a genuine one of David, though extra, composed when he fought in single combat with Goliath. I was small among my brothers, and youngest in my father’s house. I tended my father’s sheep.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My hands formed a musical instrument, and my fingers tuned a lute.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: Who shall tell my Lord? The Lord himself, he himself hears.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: He sent forth his angel and took me from my father’s sheep, and he anointed me with his anointing oil.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: My brothers were handsome and tall; but the Lord did not take pleasure in them.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: I went out to meet the Philistine, and he cursed me by his idols.

translations.name: World English Bible
translations.text: But I drew his own sword and beheaded him, and removed reproach from the children of Israel.
